name: URGENT via Bennet for America
subject: if 40 people from Cresco chip in, we'll be in good shape to reach our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| We just ran the numbers, and here's the deal, Team:

We need a surge of grassroots support right now to catch up to our fundraising goal before tomorrow's FEC deadline. [Will you pitch in to help?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab06/134673f2/3785bbb0/69975644/501326596/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Reaching this goal is absolutely crucial.

With just 4 days to go until the Iowa caucus, we can't afford to fall behind or miss a single fundraising goal. Not with so much on the line for Democrats.

[After doing the math, we determined that if 40 supporters from your city pitch in right now, we'll be in good shape to reach our $45,000 goal.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab06/134673f2/3785bbb0/69975644/501326596/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[So we're asking again, team: Will you be one of 40 people from Cresco we're counting on to pitch in right now? Anything you're able to contribute will make a difference:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab06/134673f2/3785bbb0/69975644/501326596/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_013020_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Leah, MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: MJ just texted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This Friday is our LAST end-of-month deadline before voting starts in the Texas primary.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890490/7f51f7bc/4d55f015/4ef06a94/105770937/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I just updated MJ on our progress to our critical January goal. This Friday is the LAST end-of-month deadline before voting starts in the Texas primary. Thanks to this grassroots team, we haven't missed a single goal we've set. **[Will you rush a matched donation to help us stay on track?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890490/7f51f7bc/4d55f015/4ef06a8b/105770937/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200130.2nd__839__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890490/7f51f7bc/4d55f015/4ef06a8b/105770937/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200130.2nd__839__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[Will you pitch in whatever you can right now to DOUBLE your impact and help get us on track?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890490/7f51f7bc/4d55f015/4ef06a8b/105770937/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200130.2nd__839__&amount=10&recurring=true")** I don't want to let MJ down.

Thanks,
Leah

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890490/7f51f7bc/4d55f015/4ef06a8b/105770937/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200130.2nd__839__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: Wendy
subject: Fwd: GOP doubling staff to defeat us in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
A big move like this could seriously hurt our chances to flip this seat from red to blue.
Did you see this news, friend? The Republican Party is doubling its campaign field staff - and is sending staffers to Texas to defeat me. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't concerned right now. A big move like this could seriously hurt our chances to flip this seat from red to blue.
---
But here's our saving grace: A generous group of donors is offering to **_match all gifts_** to help us defeat the GOP and expand our Democratic majority in the House. **[Can I count on you to rush $3 (becomes $6) now, before this match expires, to flip TX-21 blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk62-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount= 3")**
Really appreciate you pitching in.
-Wendy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Blue Texas 2020
Date: Thu, Jan 30, 2020
Subject: Urgent: Double the GOP staff in TX

| | |
---
**BREAKING FROM POLITICO:
Republicans are DOUBLING their campaign field staff - and sending them to defeat us in Texas!**
Friend: National Republicans have hundreds of millions of dollars at their disposal - _virtually unlimited resources_ - and they'll be spending BIG to keep anti-choice extremist Chip Roy in the House. That means the future of this race, and the future of our reproductive rights, is in serious danger.
**Luckily, a group of donors just offered to MATCH ALL GIFTS to help us fight back against the GOP, flip TX-21 blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House. But with just one day left to hit our match goal, we're still $5,900 short!**
If we're going up against the GOP's millions, we can't waste this opportunity to stretch every dollar TWICE as far. **That's why Wendy Davis is counting on you to donate every dollar you can before this match expires!**
**[Rush $3 or more- becomes $6! - to help Wendy Davis defeat the GOP, flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic majority in the House!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk62-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

Every day, more and more people are making the choice to contribute to this movement for big, structural change for the first time. **According to our estimates, our one millionth donor will chip in any minute now -- and if you make your first contribution to this email, it could be you!**

Hitting one million donors will be a huge milestone for our campaign.

With all eyes on us days before the Iowa caucuses, reaching one million donors before Monday will send a powerful message across the country: that **one million people** own a piece of Elizabeth's vision for America and are ready to fight for it.

**Making your first donation to our campaign today means you'll power our grassroots movement in Iowa and across the country AND help us get that much closer to reaching this important milestone.**

**[You could be our one millionth donor. Will you chip in $2 or whatever you can today?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a231/45c30650/1e489c947/66e0f52e/1762586501/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zVEZfT01EX0dSTV9QXzIwMjAwMTMwX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3TF_OMD_GRM_P_20200130_V1S2_P")**

clean_body: According to our estimates, our one millionth donor will chip in any minute now -- and if you make your first contribution to this email, it could be you! Hitting one million donors will be a huge... | | | "" Every day, more and more people are making the choice to contribute to this movement for big, structural change for the first time. According to our estimates, our one millionth donor will chip in any minute now -- and if you make your first contribution to this email, it could be you! Hitting one million donors will be a huge milestone for our campaign. With all eyes on us days before the Iowa caucuses, reaching one million donors before Monday will send a powerful message across the country: that one million people own a piece of Elizabeth's vision for America and are ready to fight for it. Making your first donation to our campaign today means you'll power our grassroots movement in Iowa and across the country AND help us get that much closer to reaching this important milestone. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Paul Begala
subject: Fox News just admitted it!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Nancy Pelosi emailed.
Kirsten Gillibrand emailed.
James Carville emailed.
Tom Udall emailed.
Khizr Khan emailed.
Deb Haaland emailed. Martin Heinrich emailed.
Now I'm emailing. [**_That 's how absolutely critical WINNING Ben Ray's Senate race is to OUSTING McConnell's Republican Senate. Will you rush $10 before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to close his fundraising gap with McConnell? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180") I'll let you in on the historic numbers I'm seeing:

\- Polling shows McConnell within ONE point of losing his seat._Wow._
\- Democrats could unseat him for the first time in DECADES.
\- Even Fox News admits his favorability is the worst of any Senator!

Believe me: This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot to OUST McConnell -- and FLIP his entire Senate. [**But if we lose Ben Ray 's race, our odds to defeat McConnell's Senate completely plummet.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") He needs 1,134 more gifts before tomorrow's deadline to WIN. Can ya help? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

******[**Chip in $70 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=70&amounts=10,20,130,180")******

******[**Chip in $130 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,180")******

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200130_em_fr_b3_begala_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Thank you,

Paul

|

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276cf/1530739223/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276cc/1530739223/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276cd/1530739223/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276c2/1530739223/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276c3/1530739223/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fc/18e32a7f/5148f1ab/7b2276c0/1530739223/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: In Michigan, President Trump and autoworkers celebrate the end of NAFTA
body:
Some 60,000 American plants and factories closed in the 16 years before President Trump’s election. Those jobs are coming home. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26bbb167cf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 30, 2020
---
| | |
# **In Michigan, President Trump and autoworkers celebrate the end of NAFTA**

**President Trump flew to Michigan** today, where he joined workers to celebrate the signing of his new U.S.–Mexico–Canada Agreement (USMCA) and the end of NAFTA.

**Dana Incorporated,** where the President spoke, perfectly captures America’s blue-collar spirit. Based near Detroit, the company employs more than 1,500 workers that help assemble some of the toughest vehicles in the world. Dana Inc., for example, helped invent the iconic U.S. Army Jeep in 1941.

**This factory** is the site of "116 years of brilliant American craftsmanship,” President Trump said. It’s businesses like Dana Inc. that will benefit tremendously from USMCA.

**"We just ended** **a nightmare** known as NAFTA. They took our jobs for a long time,” the President said. USMCA is the fairest, most balanced, and beneficial trade agreement we have ever signed into law, he added.

**All told,** some 60,000 U.S. plants and factories closed up shop in the 16 years before President Trump’s election. For years, politician after politician promised to fix NAFTA—only to reverse course once they got into office. While they did nothing, an astonishing _one-quarter_ of our country’s manufacturing jobs moved elsewhere.

**Michigan knows that story** all too well. Once the global hub for the auto industry, the state lost nearly _half_ those jobs under NAFTA, and roughly 200,000 manufacturing jobs in total. With USMCA, old loopholes that pushed car-part manufacturing overseas are gone: Now, at least 75 percent of every vehicle must be made in North America.

**Over the next five years** alone, USMCA is projected to boost purchases of U.S.-made auto parts by $23 billion annually while supporting $34 billion in new automotive manufacturing investments. That will help create 100,000 new jobs in this industry alone.

**The bottom line** , says President Trump: “We are bringing your jobs back home to America—and back home to Michigan.”

[THE FACTS: How ending NAFTA delivers a historic win for American workers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43c81b16fc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **5 of Democrats’ biggest impeachment whoppers**

**The first partisan impeachment** in U.S. history hasn’t been short on distractions, misleading statements, and even outright lies. The full list grows each day, but here are just a few standouts from the impeachment highlight reel:
* The falsehoods started from day one: Even now, [Adam Schiff continues to lie](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ec3977c67&e=3ee4985eea) about his team’s involvement with the “whistleblower.” His staff coordinated with the person before the complaint was ever even filed. That makes Rep. Schiff a fact witness to the case—not a neutral “investigator.”

* Many Democrats have misled the public about their true motives: They’ve long wanted to impeach President Trump for solely political purposes. Here’s just one who slipped up and [admitted it on camera](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc408c5987&e=3ee4985eea).

* Many times throughout this process, [Schiff has misrepresented “evidence,”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6534c606b7&e=3ee4985eea) trying to pass off opinions and conjecture as actual proof.

* Desperate times call for desperate measures: That was clear when [Schiff recited a totally made-up version](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=848acb1950&e=3ee4985eea) of President Trump’s phone call with President Zelenskyy.

* [Democrats lied about the urgency](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5811222db&e=3ee4985eea) of impeachment, following the fastest impeachment in history with the longest delay in passing it to the Senate.

**MORE: **[It is absolutely legitimate to ask questions about this.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d96ad24b48&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump boards Air Force One at Joint Base Andrews** | January 30, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1aafd6a854&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54c91e45e1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7a1ad63edb)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Less than 24 hours to stop Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Republicans in the impeachment trial have just about tried everything to distract Americans from the charges against Trump and block new witnesses from testifying. According to _The Wall Street Journal_ , Mitch McConnell was forced to admit to his caucus that he didn't have the votes to block Democrats from calling witnesses. Mitch McConnell is used to using his power in the Senate to block anything he pleases. He stopped President Obama's Supreme Court nomination, Merrick Garland, from even having a single hearing. He has sat on over 250 pieces of progressive legislation, including legislation mandating background checks supported by 90% of Americans. He'll do anything to protect his grasp on power. We have less than 24 hours to voice overwhelming public support for more witnesses like John Bolton and new evidence. If you believe we can't allow Mitch to get away with his sham trial rules, we need you to make your voice heard. [**Demand Mitch McConnell allow witnesses in Trump 's trial >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde42/6e9863e8/84c2ca6/1db06af7/261597884/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2NEIOVUW") Thank you for your response, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde42/6e9863e8/84c2ca6/1db06af7/261597884/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2NEIOVUW")

body:
A new poll from Morning Consult of all early states has us at 8%.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6721%2E377263%2EFoq-Zt) Yang Gang --

A new poll from Morning Consult of all early states has us at 8% -- that means we’ve surged 3 points over the course of only a few days and that’s thanks to the hard work of the #YangGang.

It’s clear that we’ve been gaining serious momentum at a rapid pace. That’s why it’s imperative that we keep it up during this final push to Iowa.

But, right now, with our FEC deadline closing in, we’re falling short of our goal. Missing this public goal on our website would be an awful message to send right before Iowans head to caucus.

We apologize if it's incorrect, but we still need a lot of donations today if we're going to catch up on our goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for all that you do, Yang2020 We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: We have HUGE momentum right now
body:
This is a crucial test of our campaign's ability to win...

Peter,

We have HUGE momentum right now in our race for U.S. Senate:

FIRST: We launched with the endorsement of President Donald Trump!

THEN: We built a conservative, grassroots-powered campaign across the state!

NOW: We just snagged another key endorsement from Donald Trump Jr.!

We have our first fundraising deadline this FRIDAY at MIDNIGHT. Can you help us keep up the momentum by donating right now? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan]

DONATE $25 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan] DONATE $50 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan] DONATE $100 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan] DONATE ANY OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan]

Bill Hagerty

---
Team,

Together, this is what we've accomplished in the last few months as we've traveled across the district:

* We hosted 18 house parties
* We opened our new campaign office
* We've had hundreds of volunteers make phone calls and knock on doors
* We garnered an incredible list of endorsements from:
* End Citizens United
* Gulf Coast AFL-CIO
* Tejano Democrats
* Bay Area New Democrats
* J Street
* Blue Dog Coalition
* Council for a Livable World
* 31 Members of Congress
* 25 State and Local Elected Officials
* 8 Ambassadors

And we've seen how scared the GOP is of our momentum, recruiting a member of the Bush family to run against me and _funding him with a new SUPER PAC._ That's how afraid they are of losing this seat.

We know this district is flippable, but we _must_ continue to hit our goals -- we have to prove that we have the grassroots power and momentum it takes to win.

**[With only $2120 to raise before midnight to hit our goal, I'm asking for your grassroots contribution to help us finish out January in the strongest position possible.](https://act.myngp.com/el/E7pJAiGOIk8_sJuAAjCGmvOnSx_SNtE8tZtGLZHUrgY=/UdwKcyVXFshtxEp7ghRr5AYY3YoWo66H70f0tJXMU3o=?refcode=20200131AM_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

We Texans know that we can face the biggest challenges because there is more that unites us than divides us. Together, we can win this race, and restore reason, compassion, and decency to Congress.

Thank you so much for your support,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

That’s why we wanted to remind you exactly what your contributions are going toward when you donate to Teresa Tomlinson’s campaign for U.S. Senate. Teresa doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, so your donations cover everything:

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Another Endorsement, Again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
I am proud to announce the endorsement of our campaign by SEANC-EMPAC (State Employees Association of North Carolina).

With over 55,000 members, SEANC is the South's leading state employees' association that works to gain respect for the more than 800,000 hardworking state employees and valuable retirees who dedicated their careers to serving the people of North Carolina. I am excited that SEANC has made the decision to join Team EricaForUS!

I am focusing my attention on GOTV for the Early Vote beginning on February 13th through the Primary on March 3rd. I ask you to JOIN US and SUPPORT US with your donations as I work to become your next U.S. Senator.

**I am One of Us for ALL of US!**

#EricaForUS

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-9KZH4Fh3WmQJpP4A9UXdAWtxGNcw6LXKWo6WCbj2LI=/flFD7MC6mDgQompOR-F7yQm0Ba1Vc3C7QL73SZTVq8U=)

{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}

Dear Friend, For folks new to our list (welcome!), or if you missed the emails of the last couple of days - I've been on jury duty since Tuesday. That means the only fundraising activity we have going at the moment is through email. We had a super-aggressive target to raise $2,700 in four short days. And you've stepped up. We've only got $973 to go. But we only have one day to finish it off. Speaking of stepping up, I'd like to give a shout out to my campaign manager Debi and her husband. Because of jury duty I had to miss an event last night in Fairfield. name: Dean Browning
subject: Pennsylvania 7th Congressional District
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
We as Americans have been experiencing a tumultuous political environment as the Liberal Elites attempt to simultaneously undo the 2016 election and rig the 2020 election by unjustly trying to impeach President Donald J. Trump.
As a proud conservative from Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District, I believe we need to do two things. First, we need to take care of Lehigh Valley and bring conservative values back to our district. Second, we need to support the President of the United States and stand up to Representative Susan Wild and her Liberal Elite friends, Nancy Pelosi and AOC.
If you can chip into my campaign before our midnight deadline, it will help me defeat Rep. Susan Wild and support our President! A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25, would help us win this election!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xT7ErN5y5nnwdjpcywZVBu0K0xC9ubQmejYY8JFEqCkcVPfD_kjogF1BYegeMgVf5Pjo8ydr5EFGdEVOekvAKJc8uRtNJ-F3fPyRFKRJ72U8PQlUzeS31btmrrtlqjG6WHATnUOHqn5hGQvaZfS2RFCg2ZmcVK4tYjK_0QZacg-fQ9ZHRrJIjA==&c=TxSnIDz431l0EqTuUXLDRtl4Q6ghJwRKE7E7GnLUNWv-CkiHFByMEw==&ch=vHF4lBITunPU1Oy9mygS-k2HMGWncdKUyn0j6znQR9Cam5N2MJCRdQ==)
---
| Rep. Susan Wild has only facilitated and encouraged the unconstitutional impeachment of President Donald J. Trump. She has also left behind the constituents of Lehigh Valley and promoted socialist policies while in Washington.
If you believe it is time for new leadership in Washington and to bring back Conservative values, then I urge you to donate to my campaign today. A donation of $100, $50, or even just $25, would go a long way in defeating Susan Wild in 2020 and supporting our President!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xT7ErN5y5nnwdjpcywZVBu0K0xC9ubQmejYY8JFEqCkcVPfD_kjogF1BYegeMgVf5Pjo8ydr5EFGdEVOekvAKJc8uRtNJ-F3fPyRFKRJ72U8PQlUzeS31btmrrtlqjG6WHATnUOHqn5hGQvaZfS2RFCg2ZmcVK4tYjK_0QZacg-fQ9ZHRrJIjA==&c=TxSnIDz431l0EqTuUXLDRtl4Q6ghJwRKE7E7GnLUNWv-CkiHFByMEw==&ch=vHF4lBITunPU1Oy9mygS-k2HMGWncdKUyn0j6znQR9Cam5N2MJCRdQ==)
---
| I look forward to meeting with you on the campaign trail and discussing how we can make Lehigh Valley a great place to live for anyone.
---
| For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you seen the recent attempts by the Democrats to convict President Trump? This whole impeachment has been a witch hunt from the beginning!
If you can donate $100, $50, or even just $25, we can help support our President and win in 2020!
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: We can't let President Trump down, Peter
body:
He's counting on us...

Peter,

I'll get right to the point:

Now that I've received endorsements from both President Trump and Donald Trump Jr. it means they're counting on us to WIN BIG in our race for U.S. Senate.

Our first HUGE fundraising deadline is tomorrow at MIDNIGHT and we can't let the President down. Can you donate before the deadline? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202]

STAND WITH TRUMP - DONATE $25 [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202] STAND WITH TRUMP - DONATE $50 [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202] STAND WITH TRUMP - DONATE $100 [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202] STAND WITH TRUMP - DONATE $250 [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=250&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202]

But we can't do it without you. Can you chip-in? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/january-2020-eom?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Jan%202]

Thank you for your support.

Bill Hagerty

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I'm humbled by this endorsement 🌲
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
I'm proud and humbled to share that the Sierra Club and the Grand Canyon Chapter of the Sierra Club have endorsed my re-election campaign for Congress!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zMM9fDHQ8veTvFUjIt8fsA1Gn1twTS5swEJ2W25YGyU=/tocHuoGyyTZyVUBeY-kzJUxefU0k3D5qmkUsNt4e0Sw=?refcode=X_013120_EOM_E&amount=25&recurring=auto)

_(Donations made using this form will be equally split between Greg Stanton for Congress and the Sierra Club)_

[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/zMM9fDHQ8veTvFUjIt8fsA1Gn1twTS5swEJ2W25YGyU=/tocHuoGyyTZyVUBeY-kzJUxefU0k3D5qmkUsNt4e0Sw=?refcode=X_013120_EOM_E&amount=25&recurring=auto)

**I believe we must fight to protect our environment for generations to come, which is why I am proud to support renewable energy projects, sustainable public transportation, and the preservation of our public lands, including the Grand Canyon. **

The Sierra Club is at the forefront of this environmental protection work and I am proud to be their partner in Congress in helping build a sustainable future for our nation and planet!

[**Will you chip in here to make a joint contribution to my re-election campaign and the Sierra Club?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zMM9fDHQ8veTvFUjIt8fsA1Gn1twTS5swEJ2W25YGyU=/tocHuoGyyTZyVUBeY-kzJUxefU0k3D5qmkUsNt4e0Sw=?refcode=X_013120_EOM_E&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Will you join us?
body:
Peter,
Thousands have written me saying they’re not watching the impeachment trial or watching as little as possible to avoid getting physically ill. Copy that!
But that hasn’t stopped news networks from broadcasting nearly wall-to-wall coverage of the hearing. And while the nation’s focus is directed towards the manufactured crisis on Capitol Hill, there is a presidential election cycle fast approaching.
My friend, we must be ready. Every month between now and November is crucial to our 2020 success.
I’m writing to you today with an urgent request. Will you donate to our 2020 efforts?
There are more than 100,000 elections this year. My Faith Votes is best positioned and equipped to help Christians vote for our values.
**We can’t do it without you. You can influence the course of our nation.**
Your donation will help activate millions of Christians to elect leaders who believe in the power of faith and freedom, small government, and in the sanctity of life, and marriage, and family. You will awaken the most powerful voting block in America; people who proudly pray, think, and act to defend our Christian values against the unrelenting assaults from Secular progressives.
Will you take just one-minute and make a donation of any amount and advance this mission with us? Act now by clicking this link: **[https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/advance_the_mission](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200131apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200131apl01nd&n=1)**
Just look at what is happening in Washington D.C. this very day. We would never have had this sad circus in Congress if more Christians had voted for members who stood for biblical values in 2018. We’re not likely to see a wholesale change of heart among many of those in Congress, so they must be stopped at the ballot box!
I hope you will [help us right now to impact the outcome in the fall](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200131apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200131apl01nd&n=2). We’ve got lots to do in the coming months and we need everyone on board between now and November!
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200131apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200131apl01nd&n=4).

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Thank you, and explaining
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
With just one day before the month ends, I wanted to reach out to tell you how grateful I am for all your support so far.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890492/7f51f7bc/4d57d5f0/4ef06a88/3259698738/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

With just one day before the month ends, I wanted to reach out to tell you how grateful I am for all your support so far. Every dollar from this team has been a crucial part of our strategy before the primary and prepares us to kick ass in the next phase of this campaign.

Can you believe this is our last end-of-month deadline before voting begins in the Texas primary? **[If you've been waiting for the right time to make your MATCHED donation --_it's right now._](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890492/7f51f7bc/4d57d5f0/4ef06a8e/3259698738/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.1nd__843__&amount=10&recurring=true")** I'll be blunt, it takes a lot of money to travel all over Texas and spread our message through ads. There are still a lot of undecided voters, and we're running out of time to reach them before voting begins.

**[So I'm asking you to pitch in to give whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline -- and your donation will be matched to double the impact!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890492/7f51f7bc/4d57d5f0/4ef06a8e/3259698738/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.1nd__843__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We need to talk to every voter we can before early voting starts February 18th and make sure they know who I am and how I'm going to fight for them in the Senate. **Will you make a matched donation right now to help?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Getting closer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

We’ve had a great start to 2020 -- it’s hard to believe that January has already come to a close.

Our campaign has traveled to small towns across our district. We’ve trudged through snow to knock on doors, we’ve visited presidential campaign offices, and we’ve met with Iowans of all ages to talk about why this election is so important.

Meanwhile, Steve King has focused on spreading his racist and divisive ideas. He pushes his fringe conspiracy theories instead of focusing on the issues that matter to regular folks in our district like farm bankruptcies, trade deals, and grocery store closures.

**[Too much is at stake in this election -- can you chip in $5 or more right now to make sure we can take on and defeat Steve King this fall?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500332/152028565/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500333/152028566/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500334/152028567/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500337/152028570/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500338/152028571/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=)
There’s a lot to look forward to this February, starting with the Iowa caucuses! We will be finishing up our first 39-county tour of the district, and plan to hit the road for Round 2 shortly thereafter.

We’re going to keep speaking about the problems facing the folks in our district and working together to bring solutions to Washington.

For far too long, Congress has ignored what’s at stake for us. They’ve favored corporations in trade deals and trade aid, leaving most farms to suffer and shut their doors. Too many people live in towns without a grocery store, leaving them to shop at dollar stores and gas stations.

We need an Iowan who will fight tooth and nail for our shared values. We all know that’s not Steve King -- it’s time for a change.

**[We’re so close to meeting our January fundraising goal -- can you pitch in to help us get there by the end of the day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500339/152028572/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=)**

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14500340/152028573/1314401546?refcode=em20_200131_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjVhOGRmNi01ZDQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2-MpX6fOxQxR8vbREx6I5r3-T_mdfLla8bkPbgsqiQ=)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Derek --

I know you've been hearing from my team a lot this week about our end of month goal, and I wanted to join in and thank you for your support. As we close out a busy January, I'm reflecting on the fight ahead.

For most of this month, I've been sitting at my Senate desk, participating in one of my most solemn duties as a U.S. Senator -- the impeachment of Donald Trump. I've been focused on the state of our democracy, and the kind of country we want to leave our children. I entered the Senate to defend the things we all care about: access to healthcare, transparency in our government, and an economy that works for everyone.

Once this trial is over, it's go time. We've got to defend the progress we've already made and keep our Commonwealth blue.

We're heading into the most important campaign I've ever run, and it's going to be a tough one. The Trump campaign is building a massive ground game in Virginia that will support my opponent, whoever that ends up being. But the people I've met across Virginia give me hope -- hope that we can start to turn our country around under a Democratic president and Democratic majorities in Congress.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for caring enough about what's happening in your communities to get out there and make a difference. I need your support to keep fighting for you in the U.S. Senate. Whether it's voting, volunteering, talking to friends and family, or supporting campaigns like mine -- you're making a real change.

Thank you for staying in the fight with me. **[Let's get to work.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d645/53d9897e/537fde7e/1c89adcc/1952973566/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-janeomnd?refcode=20200131_f_2_nd__451__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Mark Warner

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'd like to introduce you to Reverend Warnock.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Help us elect a civil rights leader to represent Georgia in the U.S. Senate. Team, It's a top priority for Democrats to take back control of the Senate this November -- that means we have to do all we can to support strong progressive candidates in key states that will help us regain the majority. One of those critical states is Georgia, where Reverend Raphael Warnock just entered the race to unseat an incumbent, pro-Trump, Republican senator. Reverend Warnock is no ordinary candidate. He's a lifelong civil rights leader who serves as the Senior Pastor at Atlanta's Ebenezer Baptist Church, the former pulpit of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. **If elected, Reverend Warnock would become the first African American senator to ever represent Georgia.** **[That's why I'm asking if you'll chip in to help send Reverend Warnock to the U.S. Senate. Split a donation right now between his campaign and mine.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-warnock-split?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Reverend Warnock is in this race to fight back against voter suppression, expand access to health care, and ensure every worker earns a living wage. We can count on him to be a champion for these causes and so much more as a member of the Senate. **Our country needs more leaders like him in Washington**. This campaign in Georgia is looking to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the entire country this year. Just yesterday, Reverend Warnock was endorsed by Stacey Abrams -- giving him some serious momentum right out of the gate. He has a real chance to win this thing, but he needs our help. His Republican opponent has already pledged to spend $20 million of her own personal wealth to defend her seat. **[Let's show Reverend Warnock that we've got his back by helping him raise the resources he'll need to win this critically important race in Georgia. Make a donation today so we can flip this seat.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-warnock-split?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I hope to have the privilege of calling Reverend Warnock one of my colleagues next year. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-warnock-split?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

body:
---
| | [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_janeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM6_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM6_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM6_U2_X1") Since my wife and I met, I've watched her give 100% to everything she does. **She defended our country overseas** \-- we deployed together three times and I watched her command more than 100 combat missions. **She 's an incredible mother to our two children **\-- she stood strong when our son Henry was fighting for his life in the hospital, and she's always here for our sons when they need her. And now, she's running an incredible campaign powered by everyday people who are sick of the way the status quo hurts them. **I know when she goes to Washington, she 'll have what it takes to stand up to extreme Republicans and fight for us.** But she's standing strong against the influence of corporate PAC money -- so she needs our help to raise enough money to take on Republican Steve Chabot. clean_body: | | "" Since my wife and I met, I've watched her give 100% to everything she does. She defended our country overseas \-- we deployed together three times and I watched her command more than 100 combat missions. She 's an incredible mother to our two children \-- she stood strong when our son Henry was fighting for his life in the hospital, and she's always here for our sons when they need her. And now, she's running an incredible campaign powered by everyday people who are sick of the way the status quo hurts them. I know when she goes to Washington, she 'll have what it takes to stand up to extreme Republicans and fight for us. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We're nearly there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Democratic candidates have been making their final pushes before the Iowa Caucus on Monday. A _New York Times_ /Siena College survey showed Bernie Sanders netting 25% of the votes, with Pete Buttigieg at 18%, Joe Biden at 17%, and Elizabeth Warren at 15%. However, the nomination is still anyone's guess. Senator Elizabeth Warren received the coveted _Des Moines Register_ endorsement, boosting her prospects before the first primary election of the 2020 cycle. With the nomination race still wide open and Trump's approval rating holding steady at 43% despite the impeachment trial, we need to know what Democrats are thinking: **Will you vote against Trump in November?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde44/6e9863e8/8499846/1db06af8/4169544069/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JEtmHKyj") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde44/6e9863e8/8499846/1db06af8/4169544069/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JEtmHKyj") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde44/6e9863e8/8499846/1db06aff/4169544069/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200131a.ND&refcode2=iXLajn0HcVzfr7561WWi")

name: Team Franken
subject: We're tired of the games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Joni Ernst used her office of public trust to subvert the impeachment proceedings to further an agenda that puts her party over Iowa. Before our eyes -- and witnessed by every Iowan -- she bowed to th
|
---
| |
---

| | Joni Ernst used her office of public trust to subvert the impeachment proceedings to further an agenda that puts her party over Iowa. Before our eyes -- and witnessed by every Iowan -- she bowed to the corruption and degradation that has become a feature of the Republican Party under Donald Trump. **We 're not sure if she does this out of fear of retribution or if she believes what she says. But either answer is disqualifying for public office of ANY level. [_Chip in to our 2020 Founding Donor drive and help us send Mike to Washington >>_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be136/112690777/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_L1&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be137/112690777/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_btn1&amount=15")
---
**This needs to change, not tomorrow, today.**
That's why the Admiral is running for Senate against her. Mike knows that respect and dignity will always have more value than blind obedience -- he proved that when he was the lone voice in the room who spoke up against the invasion of Iraq in 2002.
**Our grassroots movement is nothing without our donors.[And if you could make one of the outstanding 572 contributions we need, we would be grateful.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be130/112690777/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_L2&amount=15")**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_

---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be14c/112690777/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be14d/112690777/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24dc/33365068/4a6ef565/3f8be14e/112690777/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200131am_eom2_em_fr_abx6&amount=5&express_lane=true")**

Our January fundraising deadline is tonight, and we're still coming up short of where we need to be to hit our goal.

After tonight's FEC deadline, our fundraising numbers will become available to the public.

Reporters, pundits, and other campaigns will use these numbers to judge the strength of our campaign during this critical time in the primary election. That's why we have a plan to make sure we have the strongest fundraising report possible.

**We've crunched the numbers, and we need 535 supporters from Pennsylvania to chip in today to stay on track to reaching our January fundraising goal.**

[**We wouldn't be asking if this weren't important. We still need 535 more donors from Pennsylvania to chip in today to get us back on track. name: Sara 2020
subject: Senator Collins was waiting for her "hall pass" from McConnell
body:
They were waiting for Lamar Alexander's decision.

Friends,
You know why Susan Collins waited this long to reveal her decision on witness testimony?
**Because she was waiting on her "hall pass" from Mitch McConnell.**
McConnell first needed to know that Lamar Alexander would vote "No" on witnesses before he could let Senator Collins vote "Yes." That way, he already had the votes he needed to block witnesses and evidence.
It's all just political theater and cover for Collins while she's up for reelection -- but we see right through their act:
**[Rush a $3 contribution to defeat Susan Collins now. We need real leadership in the U.S. Senate-- and that's clearly not going to come from Senator Collins OR McConnell.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802efd/4bef7a87/6a973f8e/287fb264/701917939/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200131-1-a")**
The truth is, Susan Collins only votes against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome. Nothing will change in Washington as long as Mitch McConnell is Majority Leader. We have to take back the Senate and kick him out -- and that means we have to win in Maine.
\- Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802efd/4bef7a87/6a973f8e/287fb264/701917939/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200131-1-a")**********

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Let’s take this thing all the way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
If we don’t hit this goal, it won’t be a good look at the Iowa caucuses.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf) Yang Gang --

We gave an extension so we could meet our last goal. We cannot do that again.

The FEC official deadline for this goal is tonight, and we don’t have an option -- we cannot miss it. Our progress is public on our website as we speak.

**[So I am asking you to make a contribution now. We need all the support we can get in order to make sure we do not fall short. Stand with me and pitch in $10 or more right now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24146?t=5&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf)

The truth is, hitting this goal is critical to our campaign -- the campaign we spent over 2 years building.** We have gone through many ups and downs to get to where we are, and we cannot let this goal stand in our way.

Now is the time to leave it all on the field. The caucuses are 3 days away, and this goal is one of your last chances to have a real impact on what happens on Monday night.

I know we can do it. This is the moment we’ve been working for. **[Don’t back down now -- help us hit this goal so we can keep our momentum into the Iowa caucuses and beyond. Pitch in $10 or more now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24146?t=6&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf)**

Let’s go all the way. Let’s show that we will be the wave we’ve been waiting for.

-Andrew | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24146?t=7&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6724%2E377263%2E3P96Uf) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

We have gone through many ups and downs to get to where we are, and we cannot let this goal stand in our way. Now is the time to leave it all on the field. The caucuses are 3 days away, and this goal is one of your last chances to have a real impact on what happens on Monday night. I know we can do it. This is the moment we’ve been working for. Let’s go all the way. Let’s show that we will be the wave we’ve been waiting for. -Andrew | We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now. |

name: John Walsh, Team Markey
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
I need to ask you to help us close the gap, but first, I want to explain why this goal is so important.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de54/693b8b0a/43546591/72de489a/3937922044/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
We're still a bit short of our end-of-month goal. I need to ask you to help us close the gap, but first, I want to explain why this goal is so important.
Ed has won tough fights throughout his career. We've known from the start that we'd have to build a grassroots army to win this race because no one person can do this alone.
That's exactly what we're doing on this campaign, and it's why we set a goal for this deadline that's focused on the number of donations. The number of people stepping up to say they're with us in this fight is just as important as how much we raise.
Because here's the truth: There's never been a more important time for us to demonstrate our movement's strength.
You see, Joe Kennedy outraised us last quarter. That's not great, and it means we need to close the gap and show that our movement has what it takes to compete this time around.
We know how to do it, but we need help from people like you if we're going to succeed. Step one is making sure we hit our goal before tonight's deadline. So here's where I ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign before tonight 's deadline? We're still short of our goal right now, so Ed's counting on us to step up and close that gap.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de54/693b8b0a/43546591/72de4899/3937922044/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200131-a")
We've always known this would not be an easy race. That's why everyone here on Team Markey is so grateful to have you fighting alongside us.
Our deadline ends at midnight, so thank you in advance for making a donation before we have to close the books.
All my best,
John Walsh
Campaign Manager
********[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de54/693b8b0a/43546591/72de4899/3937922044/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtYSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200131-a")********

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de54/693b8b0a/43546591/72de4898/3937922044/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1de54/693b8b0a/43546591/72de489f/3937922044/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

Friend, As the Senate continues their pointless impeachment trial this week, let's not forget how we got into this mess. **Just a month ago, Kendra Horn had an opportunity to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and vote no against this impeachment sham. Instead, she betrayed the people of Oklahoma by voting in line with her fellow Democrats.** We can't afford to have a representative in Congress be too afraid to do what's right and push back against a plot to remove President Trump from office. We elected President Trump in 2016 to fight for us and our values in Washington D.C.******It 's time we returned the favor by taking back the House of Representatives this fall and replacing Kendra Horn with a leader who will serve Oklahoma. ** I'm running for Congress because I can't stand idly by while Nancy Pelosi, Kendra Horn, and the Democrats get away with the most shameful witch hunt our country has ever seen. **I know we can win if we start this year full of energy and motivation to Keep America Great.[Will you join me and chip in $25 today?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/2205Yz9EV1CO6DkIj6K763HA/p3BINvZOHDZtpYteE9fvAA)** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/2205Yz9EV1CO6DkIj6K763HA/p3BINvZOHDZtpYteE9fvAA) [**To**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/2205Yz9EV1CO6DkIj6K763HA/p3BINvZOHDZtpYteE9fvAA)**[night at midnight, we approach our first fundraising deadline of the calendar year. name: Dru Davis
subject: The GOP is trying to keep my mom out of Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
A lot of people know my mom, Wendy Davis, for her 13-hour filibuster...
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk65-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk65-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend,
A lot of people know my mom, Wendy Davis, for her 13-hour filibuster to stop an anti-abortion law in Texas. But I know her fight for women and families started way before she put those pink sneakers on.
**That 's why, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my mom's campaign for Congress and get your gift doubled. But first, let me take a second to explain why your gift would mean so much to both of us.**
When my mom was 19 and had my sister Amber, she knew all too well what it was like to stretch every dollar as far as it could go - and that struggle inspired my mom to fight for families like her own. She took that fight to the Fort Worth City Council and the Texas Senate. And now she's taking it to Congress.
**But the GOP is doing everything they can to keep my mom out of Washington. They 're pouring money into Texas to make sure she loses this race. The last person they want in that seat is a Texas-tough champion for families: They want a rubber stamp for their anti-woman agenda. **
**That 's why we can't afford to let this match go to waste. We've still got a $3,200 shortfall to make up before tonight, I'm asking from the heart: ****[Will you rush $3 or more to have your gift doubled to elect my mom, Wendy Davis, flip Texas from red to blue and expand our House majority?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk65-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
I really appreciate your generosity - especially at a time like this. Thank you.
Dru
[Contribute](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk65-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3c/704929dc/1624807e/39938527/667095536/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3c/704929dc/1624807e/39938526/667095536/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3c/704929dc/1624807e/39938519/667095536/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Wendy Davis for Congress
3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525
Austin, TX 78703

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: disturbingly;
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | My closest Democratic colleagues all asked for your help:

\- Nancy Pelosi
\- Adam Schiff
\- Kirsten Gillibrand
\- James Carville
\- Paul Begala
\- Khizr Khan
\- Deb Haaland
\- Gabby Giffords
\- Tom Udall
\- Martin Heinrich [**_After my closest colleagues -- and President Obama himself -- called you to action to flip the Senate, I thought I would see a surge of support before tonight's very first end-of-month deadline of the election year. But that's not what happened. So generous donors just offered to MATCH gifts until midnight to close this critical gap. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") This is bad: It's starting to look like I might not meet my very first goal of the year.

**[Thankfully, generous donors just offered to MATCH gifts for these final 14 hours.](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")**

I know how hard you work for every cent in your pocket. I wouldn't ask if tonight's deadline wasn't absolutely critical to defeating McConnell's Senate. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
`**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com **` `[**DOUBLE YOUR $10 >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200131_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")`

Truthfully, I don't like asking you for money.

name: Gary Peters
subject: Trump just left Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I had to reach out to you directly.
| | |
---
Hi there: Donald Trump just left Michigan for the second time in two months, so I had to reach out to you directly.
I'll be frank - I'm not surprised that Trump has locked his sights on our state. He and Mitch McConnell have devised a plan to keep the Senate under the GOP's stranglehold. They're trying to buy my Senate seat, and here's why: _They know that Democrats cannot win the Senate if we lose in Michigan._
**Trump and McConnell 's influence and outside money are going to make this race incredibly tight, folks - right-wing special interests have been flooding millions into Michigan to try and defeat me, and recent polling has me neck and neck with my opponent.**
**[_In a race this tight, every dollar counts. And without protecting my seat, Democrats have no chance of taking back the Senate - that's why I need you to step up now and make your first donation of the year before midnight to help us get the last $7,462 to meet our goal._](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da9db/5721a3ed/70eb794b/efb750a/2429378796/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNDgtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk248-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

At midnight, we'll close the books on January and have to start preparing for the rest of the quarter. The amount we raise by tonight will set the tone for the rest of the year, so I really don't want to come up short.

Gary

We have only hours left to reach our January goal and we are at risk of coming up short. == We cannot take the Senate for granted, especially with these ongoing attacks from the Left. Democrats need to flip just FOUR seats to take the Senate. If that happens, it is the end for the conservative agenda. Our progress will be erased. Everything we have fought for will be gone forever. Don't give the Radical Left an INCH. We've come too far and worked too hard to roll over. == We are running out of time. The deadline is TODAY. Do you want Chuck Schumer (Pelosi 's top ally) running the Senate? Show Pelosi and Schumer that Americans stand with President Trump and his Senate allies. == Thank you, Senator Mitch McConnell == If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. T&C/Privacy Policy: == | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. NRSC, 425 2nd Street NE, Washington D.C. 20002 | | NRSC | 425 2nd St. NE, Washington, DC 20002 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

name: Team Bennet
subject: it's truly now or never
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends -

Tonight is our huge FEC reporting deadline, and we're in an all out sprint to the finish to ensure we hit $45,000 before midnight!! It's truly now or never. If we don't hit this goal, we won't have the resources to compete in the final stretch before voting starts.

[Here's what we know:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab02/134673f2/3799d608/699728c2/3346053278/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") More than half of early state voters are going to decide on their candidate over the next week. On the ground and in the polls, we are seeing our momentum build. We cannot come up flat now!

[Hitting this deadline will allow us to keep airing our TV ads, knocking doors, and reaching out to the hundreds of thousands of undecided Democratic voters.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab02/134673f2/3799d608/699728c2/3346053278/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step we take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with us, fueling this campaign to victory.

[Can you make your first donation of $5 before our midnight deadline? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab02/134673f2/3799d608/699728c2/3346053278/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Crying Wolf on Impeachment
body:
"Democrats broke every standard of due process, transparency and fairness in their House investigation." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec4ed8f43d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Crying Wolf on Impeachment**

“The impeachment trial of Donald J. Trump is coming down to one big question: Will Democrats, by crying wolf, drown out the more legitimate Republican cry of foul? ‘Foul’ has served as the GOP’s most powerful and honest argument from the first days of these impeachment maneuverings,” Kimberly Strassel writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“Democrats broke every standard of due process, transparency and fairness in their House investigation, making a mockery of their constitutional duty.”
* “They hid the identity of the original accuser, denying Republicans and the country the ability to judge his motives.”

* “They held secret depositions, barring more than three-quarters of House members, as well as the press and the American public.”

* “They called 18 witnesses, but blocked the president from calling any in his defense.”

* “The White House legal team was excluded from the proceedings—prohibited from cross-examining witnesses, denied the ability to introduce any evidence that spoke to the central question of the president’s focus on Ukrainian corruption.”

The kicker: In the end, “Democrats approved two articles of impeachment that failed to identify a crime.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea43de59dc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump will propose a $42 million budget increase in February to expand support for victims of human trafficking and to boost investigations and prosecutions.” The funding is part of a push by Ivanka Trump to bring more attention to the illegal trade, Michael Wilner reports for _[McClatchy DC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d7cd30cf74&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “After joining the administration, one of the first assignments I was given by President Trump was to develop a plan to resolve the decades-old Israel-Palestinian conflict. I am pleased to say that, after three years of work, we have made a breakthrough,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner writes for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a781e65240&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Democrats have accused President Donald Trump of using the government to go after his political opponents, yet they are doing the very same thing right now on the floor of the U.S. Senate. They have wrongly weaponized the U.S. Constitution in order to go after their political opponent, President Trump. Does their hypocrisy have no shame?” Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) and Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-FL) write for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=519fff252c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e63da4cabb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=768d820129&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=125aa3cd3d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
I'm reaching out one last time to let you know that we're close to hitting our first monthly fundraising goal of the year.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and our Republican opponent are looking for any sign of weakness from our campaign. We can't give them a reason to think we're vulnerable. That's why reaching our goal tonight is so important. Please, pitch in if you can.

I can't tell you how grateful I am for folks like you stepping up when it matters most. Thank you, thank you, thank you.

-- Tina

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: Democrats Ask the Right Questions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Dear Peter ,
There's a lot to get to today - deadlines, trainings, and news - so let's get to it!
Have a great weekend!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
- Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
ATTN: VOTER REGISTRATION DEADLINE
IS MONDAY, MARCH 3RD
The voter registration deadline for voting in the March 3rd presidential primary is this MONDAY, February 3rd. Make sure you double check your registration - many voters have been purged the past few years. After you've checked your voter registration, make sure to help a friend register to vote. Friends that vote together, stay together!

February
3,
2020
-

Deadline

-

-

and
