Register or check your voter registration now! [https://iwillvote.com/]
https://iwillvote.com/ [https://iwillvote.com/]
HELP PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Voter%20Protection%20Training%20%281%29.png]
Find out how you can help protect the vote and ensure everyone's voice is heard at the polls this year. These training sessions will teach you the basics of voter protection and how to become a poll watcher on Super Tuesday, March 3rd 2020. Register for an event near you now:
*
Nashville
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2945267235494971/]
*
Knoxville
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2442545592674567/]
*
Chattanooga
[https://www.facebook.com/events/2290077751297104/]
*
Memphis
[https://www.facebook.com/events/200449217762779/]
BECOME A DNC DELEGATE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20Delegate%20Workshop%20%282%29.png]
The deadline to apply to be a DNC Delegate is less than 30 days away. Visit TNDP's website for more details. [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-delegate-selection-plan/]
We are hosting a series of workshops across the state to explain the process for becoming a delegate. R [https://www.facebook.com/tndem/?ref=bookmarks] egister for a Delegate Selection Workshop near you! [https://www.facebook.com/pg/tndem/events/]
REPRESENTATIVE HODGES QUESTIONS
MOTIVES FOR KEEPING
NATHAN BEDFORD FORREST STATUE
During a committee meeting this week, Representative Rick Staples proposed removing Nathan Bedford Forrest's bust from the Capital. During a Confederate historians' bargaining to keep it, Representative Jason Hodges asked an important question that reveals the horrific acts the bust actually represents. Watch the viral video now! [https://twitter.com/tndp/status/1222307752250421250?s=20]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-01-31%20at%209.39.34%20AM.png]
TN HOUSE DEMOCRATS DEMAND
$1.5 BILLION INVESTMENT FOR OUR
STUDENTS' SCHOOLS
After overwhelming data of voucher programs not working and a high rate of fraud associated with vouchers, Republicans spent hours passing a rule to speed up the implementation of vouchers in Tennessee. Rather than spending the millions of Tennessee taxpayer dollars it will take to implement, Republicans should be focused on meeting the required funding for our public schools. Tennessee ranks 45th in the entire nation for funding public education, yet, Governor Bill Lee likes to brag about the billions of dollars in Tennessee's surplus. In a press conference on Tuesday, Democrats from the State House and State Senate announced a plan to fix BEP funding and increase student funding by $1.5 Billion to address three main issues:
*
Boosting
teacher
pay
*
Increasing
the
number
of
nurses
and
social
workers
in
schools
*
Updating
student-to-staff
ratios
Read more.... [https://medium.com/@TNSenateDems/1-5-billion-investment-needed-for-public-school-students-democratic-leaders-say-d1d03d829729]
LISTEN NOW: TNDP PODCAST
http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast [http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast]
TNDP has partnered with We Own This Town Network to launch "If You Didn't Know, Now You Know: A TNDP Podcast." [http://bit.ly/TNDPPodcast] Recorded live from the Tennessee state capitol in Nashville, we speak with lawmakers, activists, and candidates, people who can tell you - and show you - how the laws are made that affect our lives. There's no shortage of issues to be covered - about freedom, opportunity, equity, justice, and safety - and we'll hustle to keep you in the loop.
Check out last week's episode with Senator Katrina Robinson and the Tennessee AFL-CIO on The Right To Work For Less. [https://open.spotify.com/episode/60fd0qNK7i6VkljGdcd7Jn]
Check out this week's episode with the Tennessee Educators Association President, Beth Brown. [https://open.spotify.com/episode/380tckrsp41AonzhXM2djf]
TWEETS FROM THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-01-31%20at%2010.10.28%20AM.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-01-31%20at%2010.12.55%20AM.png]
SENATOR LAMAR ALEXANDER DEFINES
HIS 40+ YEARS POLITICAL CAREER BY
HELPING COVER UP
DONALD TRUMP'S CORRUPTION
Millions of phone calls were made and thousands of letters were sent. After days of Democrats from the US House and Senate asking tough questions about Donald Trump's corruption and collusion to interfere with a United States' election, Senator Lamar Alexander decided to vote no on allowing witnesses during the impeachment trial. His reasoning? He already knew Donald Trump was guilty. Read more.... [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2020/01/31/lamar-alexanders-craven-surrender-trump-leaves-our-country-exposed/]
INVEST IN DEMOCRACY
Enraged by Lamar Alexander's decision? Heartbroken by Tennessee General Assembly's Republicans focus on a slate of hate instead of legislation to help families? The most impactful thing you can do to change that is vote. But, we’ve got to have strong candidates running good campaigns if we want to win, and that's where your investment in the party is crucial. It’s expensive to maintain and expand TNDP operations in an election year. Paying for things like poll watcher trainings, candidate recruitment efforts and campaign support are expensive – that’s why every dollar you contribute helps us win elections and fight back.

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: FWD: End of Month message 📎📎📎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, My team sent you an email yesterday.
We are only **HOURS** from our end of the month deadline and right now we’re still **$1,982 short** of reaching our crucial deadline.

body:
Fellow Democrat,
The Democratic National Convention will be here before you know it. If you want to run to be a Delegate to the Democratic National Convention, you may join one of our trainings on Saturday, February, 15th to figure out what all you have to do.
These trainings are not required but will outline the process of how to become a Delegate.
There will be a training available in each Congressional District. You may join the one that is most convenient for you.
[Click here to view the training schedule and RSVP for one of the locations. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14506695/152086768/-290346242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGVlZWI1Zi03NTQ0LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qPUflrUkViXcqxTA2doEjMlb6bbKb9UMLrgzig9-6Zo=&emci=c4b0ee79-7244-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=30eeeb5f-7544-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)

name: Wilmot Collins (personal)
subject: A much-deserved demotion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
If we want to make actual progress for Montanans, we need to lift the gridlock in the Senate. | | | Folks, today’s our last shot at hitting our goal of filling our Defeat Senator Daines Fund with 500 digital donations. We still need 148 more donations, and if we get there, we’ll be in a position to not only defeat our Republican opponent and flip the Senate but also give Mitch McConnell a much-deserved demotion to Minority Leader. name: Genevieve Collins
subject: So much is happening!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHc4yqXGfRVskgeVxFfNEVBHeR00Xlq0auzFhAOtqw1zAESHcfsMhc8QO1cI_B3hBLMsc0P9V4GQHjI87qj-_Ijed06QGlWskhOFzU04F1sehLheRyodyoYpp6MKed29FjlLk5JJfhN9un5xzYaIKNyi43jPDy4oKgCP-xL368yRDS-7kSPP2yBe2YzHVzyM&c=0zcvBmjUjD9H8VzgP-VpAocufVjTGVHUUL-Bs3HqSshBlZQrB_-pcw==&ch=zi1BNJ4vHz84EJk8feNOHkbBmhsu-R38o5mk2lz7fcuNt83FAtBHWA==)
---
| Peter,
January has come to an end, and it's hard to believe that we'll be voting in just a few weeks! With Early Voting coming up fast, we're hard at work meeting voters, going to events, and engaging with our grassroots supporters.
---
| I attended numerous meetings and Republican gatherings this week, including getting to spend a great time with the Northwood Republican Women on Monday and the First Ladies Republican Women on Tuesday.
Wednesday, I got to speak with the Turtle Creek Breakfast Club in the morning. That evening at an event with the Associated Republicans of Texas, I got to chat with my friend, Gov. Abbott! It's always great to see Gov. Abbott, and he's doing a wonderful job leading our state.
---
|
---
| In addition, our campaign continued to roll out more endorsements...they have just kept on coming over the last several weeks!
This week, we added the endorsements of Sen. Don Huffines, and Sen. Florence Shapiro. They're both great conservatives who served North Texas with distinction, and I'm excited to have them on board!
Finally, we're launching a new TV ad this week that we hope to play for the duration of the campaign! It's a 60-second version of our wildly successful "100% Texan" spot that we released earlier in January. If you'd like to contribute to keep the ad on air, [please click here to donate.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHc4yqXGfRVskgeVxFfNEVBHeR00Xlq0auzFhAOtqw1zAESHcfsMhQHa-K9nq_YnQ_PJDgg2RYsI1n_01sLaUJ_qdNobk2S4u6wLYqFcHj8SGx62uCWTfRI-9NcL5iDe9ZZmQ54oy2jSpAk4SyMT33cc5we_7jooVgRNZ8_1cDSXbUSLfBpGaw==&c=0zcvBmjUjD9H8VzgP-VpAocufVjTGVHUUL-Bs3HqSshBlZQrB_-pcw==&ch=zi1BNJ4vHz84EJk8feNOHkbBmhsu-R38o5mk2lz7fcuNt83FAtBHWA==)
---
| New TV Ad!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHc4yqXGfRVskgeVxFfNEVBHeR00Xlq0auzFhAOtqw1zAESHcfsMhcAHEAgUv8faEO2fiEJTq46UvG5rf-AesLj-H-2FySYAMdvzFuq0jEi5OolU5ZbFYhI_mIj0H9iBpQkCuNt1OmfuHscbJDcLvw==&c=0zcvBmjUjD9H8VzgP-VpAocufVjTGVHUUL-Bs3HqSshBlZQrB_-pcw==&ch=zi1BNJ4vHz84EJk8feNOHkbBmhsu-R38o5mk2lz7fcuNt83FAtBHWA==)
---
| That's our update for this week. As we get closer and closer to early voting and Election Day, I am very appreciative to everyone who has helped out on our campaign. This campaign wouldn't be success with out you!
---
|
---
| Genevieve
---
| |

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Ed Markey + dark money = need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390351/55b66746/227f64d4/80ffb5d/690406442/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | News just broke that my opponent is trying to start a super PAC. Dark, unlimited and untraceable money could be coming into this race in a matter of weeks. For a so-called progressive champion, he seems to forget something central to Democrats' generations-long fight for campaign finance reform: _Super PACs are a dirty Republican tactic. Our party is better than this._ **So I'm asking you for help. We need to prove that people are more powerful than his super PAC.** [**Make a donation right now to help us fight against Ed Markey's dark money.**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390351/55b66746/227f64d4/80ffb5e/690406442/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe-nopacs?refcode=2020-01-31-markeypac&recurring=1&amount=3") This election is going to be won by people--not outside interests that want to protect the status quo. clean_body: I’m going to level with you. = Team, I’m going to level with you. As one of the top targets for Republicans in 2020, there is a fight coming and we need to be ready. GOP special interests are already pulling out all the stops by bringing Republican leaders like Mike Pence and Betsy DeVos to our back yard to prop up the radical agenda that Scott Perry represents and flooding our district with dark money. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = No matter what may lie ahead, we’re going to keep working to give South Central Pennsylvanians the representation in Congress they deserve. Between now and Election Day, we will host more town halls, knock on thousands more doors, and take every opportunity there is to spread our message to as many voters as possible. These monthly goals go a long way in making sure we have the resources to do so. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your continued support. name: Andrew Yang for President
subject: If everyone reading this chips in just $5 or $10, we will cross this goal easily by midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We risk losing the chance to elect the most capable candidate to take on Trump.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6741%2E377263%2EY8-piD) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24166?t=5&akid=6741%2E377263%2EY8-piD) Yang Gang, we’ve already missed two goals. We can’t miss another. Not now. Not at an FEC deadline.

**[We need 49 donations from Pennsylvania right now to help close the gap. Rush a contribution of $10 or more before midnight so that we don’t miss the most critical goal we’ve ever set.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24166?t=6&akid=6741%2E377263%2EY8-piD)**

We’re at a pivotal moment.

We need to go into the Iowa caucuses and New Hampshire primary with big fundraising numbers and a surge of grassroots support so that folks know we can win.

More and more Americans are realizing that the way to beat Trump isn’t with politics as usual -- it’s with someone with powerful solutions like Andrew’s. Andrew knows how we can win -- and, more importantly, how we can create a brighter future for all.

**[But he needs your help to do it. Please pitch in or we risk losing the chance to elect the most capable candidate to take on Trump. Pitch in $10 or more right now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24166?t=7&akid=6741%2E377263%2EY8-piD)**

Just **49 of you** can help us raise what we need to hit $3 million in 12 hours.

Andrew needs your support more than ever.

Andrew Yang for President | **We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/24166?t=8&akid=6741%2E377263%2EY8-piD)

clean_body: My team let me know you haven’t had a chance to support our campaign’s first fundraising deadline of the election year. This is one of the most important months of the year and we are only 80 donations away from reaching our goal. Will you donate just a few dollars to my campaign before January is over? You can bet that Kendra Horn is fundraising off of Nancy Pelosi, George Soros and their socialist friends. Thank you for all of the support you've shown so far for my campaign and thank you for helping reach this major goal! Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

We just came out of a budget meeting. With less than 24 hours to go until our last end-of-month deadline before early voting begins in the Texas primary, it's clear: We HAVE TO hit our 3,000 new donor goal. But we still need 487 more people!

**[Will you be one of them? Until midnight only, your donation will be MATCHED and go 2x as far>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489049e/7f51f7bc/4d682b72/4ef06bfb/907429027/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.2nd__845__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**[Will you help us do it by pitching in $3 (becomes $6), $10 (becomes $20), or whatever you can _right now?_](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489049e/7f51f7bc/4d682b72/4ef06bfb/907429027/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.2nd__845__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Remember, this match opportunity only lasts until midnight!

Thanks, Peter. We will only win this with your help.

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend: I’m writing today to ask you to contribute to my campaign for president. I don’t reach out about this very often. Our campaign is people-powered, but we are fortunate not to have to ask our supporters to do the heavy lifting of funding this work. I have said many times that I would spend my last dollar to save American democracy in a heartbeat — and never regret it for a second. But that doesn’t mean that we don’t ever need your support. Today is the first Federal Election Commission filing deadline of 2020, and the support we’re able to get on the record by midnight tonight will send a strong message that our momentum is real. **Will you pitch in five or ten dollars to show that you’re standing by my side and ready to beat Donald Trump in November?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish together over the past six months. This campaign has gone from a small, longshot operation out of my hometown of San Francisco, California to a formidable grassroots machine that spans the country. We have more than 80 campaign staff on the ground in South Carolina, many of whom are from there and are organizing in their own neighborhoods and communities. Our Nevada team is led by a powerhouse group of brilliant Latina women who are committed to building the America they believe is possible. Together we have driven the national conversation forward on issues that matter deeply to Americans, from reparations to climate to housing. All of this has been possible because you believe, like I do, that when you see something wrong, you tell the truth about it as loudly as you can — and you do whatever you can to step up and fight back. **Let’s continue this fight together. Please consider making a donation to my campaign to invest in moving our shared values forward. You can click below to contribute securely online:** [_**https://go.tomsteyer.com/show-your-support**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBp8P9ONZnN8l-2Ffw22HZRSC1mFfjCO0JskafmRGtoRfu5oW2-2Fz8zqbaDo-2F8Vv-2FvtNeGG6KZaCo9aN4X-2FZn-2BEGlAR-2B00UAz4JOV4mDeO5k50et6xWNx4X8imtFKaCUjiDoZx7jt5Ivd-2BEbQZ7-2BOcnAGVu0MKYQD5yJthRJu20Q9iO6IU-2BtTqQQljO-2FkJeZSJEMFirK9V3qXWhlPR-2FXrTlynFs5qbJuX3K-2FpvY3-2BsOaLJor_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFeHX2jIiX6U9U918EDN5CVi-2BjWlFYyKteESFPvm7dZ6ZfM0E-2FGokpmfWwlc7TnNhqDWVYzvPTqcpmfHEIvN2AharfFGEaktkKfo1j11Bma1IYvAfpyNmm-2FmFXs35ZJ0lcXISXuf-2FTUnOe-2B6SEMG6caC0ggOFpPlbLMsbM43NBwWagzs6DIhCDc0Br7bktbxukPCMju1bvSFhIH5KcVUNkkzGMHZvT4RDf-2BFuQ51fu0nK3FKWgdkbZTp6l3uDQP0kk-2FOIC9obURJUWV2eJwHjIAGeWngm8YYCCwXbawacphZkDveGBr5-2FkgH1AgnXnyjt2mUse40Bl2aslyzez4EXYQ-2BKOb-2FV1QLToGnMucsG2odeg-3D-3D) Thank you very much. clean_body: | | | | Friend: I’m writing today to ask you to contribute to my campaign for president. I don’t reach out about this very often. Our campaign is people-powered, but we are fortunate not to have to ask our supporters to do the heavy lifting of funding this work. I have said many times that I would spend my last dollar to save American democracy in a heartbeat — and never regret it for a second. But that doesn’t mean that we don’t ever need your support. Today is the first Federal Election Commission filing deadline of 2020, and the support we’re able to get on the record by midnight tonight will send a strong message that our momentum is real. Will you pitch in five or ten dollars to show that you’re standing by my side and ready to beat Donald Trump in November? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish together over the past six months. This campaign has gone from a small, longshot operation out of my hometown of San Francisco, California to a formidable grassroots machine that spans the country. We have more than 80 campaign staff on the ground in South Carolina, many of whom are from there and are organizing in their own neighborhoods and communities. Our Nevada team is led by a powerhouse group of brilliant Latina women who are committed to building the America they believe is possible. Together we have driven the national conversation forward on issues that matter deeply to Americans, from reparations to climate to housing. All of this has been possible because you believe, like I do, that when you see something wrong, you tell the truth about it as loudly as you can — and you do whatever you can to step up and fight back. Let’s continue this fight together. Please consider making a donation to my campaign to invest in moving our shared values forward. You can click below to contribute securely online: Thank you very much. Tom Steyer | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering, . If you want to be a delegate for Tom at the DNC convention in Milwaukee this July, . To update your contact information, . name: Cory Booker
subject: Become a founding donor before midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | Team, I know we've written to you a few times about our $350,000 fundraising goal. Let me tell you a little bit about why this particular goal is so important. When I made the difficult decision to end my campaign for president, I knew we'd be entering my Senate re-election bid behind where we'd have liked to be at this point. In fact, there are already five Republicans running against me. Many people like to say that New Jersey is a blue state, but we can't afford to take anything for granted. I want to ramp up this campaign as quickly as possible so we can win -- and win big -- this November. **To do that, we 'll need more resources -- and that's where our $350,000 goal comes in. Our deadline is 11:59 p.m. tonight and we're only a few thousand dollars short. Please chip in as one of our Founding Donors to help make up the difference.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

We're planning to use these funds to bring on more staff, launch our first digital ads, and build the type of campaign that we can all be proud of.
If we can reach this goal, it'll also send a huge message to Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and each of my challengers that we're not taking this campaign lightly -- and that we have the strong grassroots support to ensure victory.
**[It would be a huge setback if we fell short of such an important goal just as we're getting this campaign off the ground. If you can send in a donation before tonight's deadline at 11:59 p.m., please do so here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I'm hoping I'll be able to write to you tomorrow morning with some good news.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200131_CB_20200131-fr-CB-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fb1/5fca0d19/7af08a53/291d3215/1690736985/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Response Needed: Democratic support for removing Trump dropping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, with the Senate impeachment trial continuing into its second week, the GOP is attacking the impeachment trial as "boring" in their latest attempt to convince Americans that the charges against Trump should be dismissed. Unfortunately, it seems to be working. According to a new poll from Emerson College, 17% of Democrats and 49% of Americans don't support removing Trump, a marked rise of 9% in support for Trump among Democrats in the past few days. We need to hear from you immediately so we can understand in real time where engaged Democrats stand: **Do you support removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde46/6e9863e8/84b75ff/1db06510/563689013/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/VlldWVTb") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde46/6e9863e8/84b75ff/1db06510/563689013/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/VlldWVTb") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde46/6e9863e8/84b75ff/1db06510/563689013/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/VlldWVTb")

| | Peter, The first major deadline of the year is here and we need your help.

National Democrats have spent the past few months dividing the country with a sham impeachment just to fire up their far-left base in preparation for 2020.

They're pouring millions into Kendra Horn's campaign coffers because they know that her vote to impeach President Trump has shattered the lie that she was ever "moderate."

I have a proven record of fighting liberal interests. I'm ready and willing to take the fight to the radical left and their enablers like Kendra Horn to give Oklahoma's 5th district the conservative representation it deserves.

[**Will you help us finish this month strong by donating $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 by our deadline at MIDNIGHT tonight so we can power our campaign to take back Oklahoma's 5th district and fight for conservative values?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4e83dbd4c7&e=795c6d9796)

I'm running because I know we have to defend the American dream otherwise our kids and grandkids will not get the chance to experience the blessings of liberty.

[**Please join our campaign by donating whatever you can by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can beat Kendra Horn, give President Trump an ally in Congress, and defend liberty.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=0f22d5c68f&e=795c6d9796)

Thank You.

For Oklahoma,

\- Janet Barresi

body:
I still have yet to hear from you and I’m beginning to get worried. The hours are ticking down before January’s End of Month deadline strikes, and I h Peter, I still have yet to hear from you and I’m beginning to get worried. The hours are ticking down before January’s End of Month deadline strikes, and I have yet to see your name on my donor’s list.
**[Peter, will you chip in now to show the far leaning left that you have not abandoned this fight and that you are still committed to and support our president?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d0110df28d0e4ad7ae5b4b5bdc0010c7&_e=j9N268_fxk_Dq90RGzUHpl_a6-Wyp5Ki1964dN6_H8HnXDUWODU_jW37OYr5wkuGE7Hy4QPRCOwExe0UZEdwCGx9_hJy4XbrolQc7UD_RuAE41PKdP8Pk00NocwfU0UAsgzwiCdclYdBpKcZ--qs8t-cxhpZ1HX0zh_uzu_7OY7dCs8g92Zh2-6bEwJbNR7PuU7gQbG9mi2UrYEiIvKHydNOrfXw3ZVkaYpbXiIsaRp4y_136va_gA-tH0wyS4PpJsBJtKjwMo0QDHQwVRpdwjScWpk9MC9_a5H_P4BW0NKYmGrxg8NNdYZtp5LevKRxDb4wZ6kx9B_Cpg8G615H5fRiEHXQ4me5nNLUIPXh4v-5taBQlmpBcSUA2z_mYdqnmlZq6Srylf2MYoCgaCBOPzSih4pCjCB48snmoNgD1cbV8EzvsIhAZFEjmqDBJH6AQPBZ61PODof6obFNeZMBsA%3D%3D) ** [ **END OF MONTH FUND** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=d0110df28d0e4ad7ae5b4b5bdc0010c7&_e=j9N268_fxk_Dq90RGzUHpl_a6-Wyp5Ki1964dN6_H8HnXDUWODU_jW37OYr5wkuGE7Hy4QPRCOwExe0UZEdwCGx9_hJy4XbrolQc7UD_RuAE41PKdP8Pk00NocwfU0UAsgzwiCdclYdBpKcZ--qs8t-cxhpZ1HX0zh_uzu_7OY7dCs8g92Zh2-6bEwJbNR7PuU7gQbG9mi2UrYEiIvKHyZWNziQ6gvU9X7MQnJQ4DcAVzEZBtAgYhbCzyel1LE-Qnwr8wH88iFD7egM2dbmpYy5x0XKX9ZVJOcaMO1_Ya57Ncg97dphSc5dPIBAoT0ZI5vIPcC1sMofZX7eR5JOQlzn-o2_pmiwTd7TOd-F1vmmEFebkBeJrfluV4rfs2tmXousR7c9NIxCqOYYJ_q311Qtjd9VAE84Us6T_eOmnOJF-BSmh7CoyaxPbU-OpwDSQ-eBprzzi9XqLpIrArgvEoQ%3D%3D) When I see our donor list tomorrow, will you be on it? Or should I just assume that you’ve given up and abandoned this all? Peter, I don’t want that to be the case. I know that won’t be you.
We have to act quickly.
Lisa \-------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, It’s been a busy month.
We have entered into double digits counting down to the primary election, and we have also stood and watched this last month as our president was placed in front of our nation with this **FARCE OF AN IMPEACHMENT** process.

clean_body: I still have yet to hear from you and I’m beginning to get worried. The hours are ticking down before January’s End of Month deadline strikes, and I h Peter, I still have yet to hear from you and I’m beginning to get worried. The hours are ticking down before January’s End of Month deadline strikes, and I have yet to see your name on my donor’s list. When I see our donor list tomorrow, will you be on it? Or should I just assume that you’ve given up and abandoned this all? Peter, I don’t want that to be the case. I know that won’t be you. We have to act quickly. Lisa \-------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, It’s been a busy month. We have entered into double digits counting down to the primary election, and we have also stood and watched this last month as our president was placed in front of our nation with this FARCE OF AN IMPEACHMENT process. With the primary election and November drawing closer and closer, meeting our end of month goals are becoming even more vital. We have to show Susan Wild and the left that we are committed now more than EVER to taking back the House. Peter, we are days away from our End of Month deadline. I need to know you’re still committed to meeting this goal. Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress (PA-07) PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

Every dollar we raise from this email will make a difference.

Every donation will mean we can announce a bigger January fundraising number -- and we only have a few hours left to hit our goal before the deadline at midnight.

Every contribution will help to fill in our budget for organizing and advertising across the country -- and we only have a few days left to reach Iowans before the caucuses on February 3.

And every grassroots gift will help show that presidential candidates don't have to raise money from big donors behind closed doors, suck up to corporate interests and PACs and Washington lobbyists, or beg billionaires to start a Super PAC.

[**I'm only asking because your continued support right now would be powerfully important: Will you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help grow our movement and hit our goal before midnight?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a380/45c30650/1e42e3402/66e34e8b/934578495/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zS0ZfRU9NX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTMxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3KF_EOM_EWD_E_20200131_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
The last few weeks and days before the Iowa caucuses have been a whirlwind -- but the overwhelming feeling that's hit me has been gratitude.

Gratitude for the many who've chipped in to own an equal piece of this campaign. Gratitude for the volunteers who are working their hearts out. Gratitude for everyone who's in this fight because they know we can make real change as long as we work side by side.

We're going to keep building this campaign the right way -- person to person, conversation by conversation, without selling my time to big donors, and without making promises to shady special interests.

That's the only way we'll build a movement strong enough not just to win the nomination, but also to defeat Donald Trump and end corruption in Washington.

**We'll make our government and our economy work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. But it's only going to happen if people like you continue to step up when it really counts -- and today is one of those moments.**

[**If you can, please make a contribution to help hit our goal before midnight's deadline.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a380/45c30650/1e42e3402/66e34e8b/934578495/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zS0ZfRU9NX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTMxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3KF_EOM_EWD_E_20200131_V1S1_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

body:
Our end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight, and we still need to raise another $2,141 to close our budget gap and be able to expand our grassroots army to Flip Florida and defeat Donald Trump.

Your donation will go directly to laying the groundwork to drive up turnout in blue counties like Broward and Miami-Dade to counter the redder parts of Florida and the unlimited special interest money backing Trump's campaign.

[**Can I count on you to click here to donate before our deadline hits at midnight?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.%3D%3D/?g=J5_lAvNIB05ZAYO50yUzJOA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-eom-jan20?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer= &utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+click+here+to+dona&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_IA_200131_1_9&source=DWS_EM_FR_IA_200131_1_9&refcode=DWS_EM_FR_IA_200131_1_9")

subject: Dems have their eyes on Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPP3nFJ1Ew4HhtIg8aW3ULHgac8RxfAcU_WIfgf_QRgx1dcfv2HxSYv1Slg6xveSrLPE1Z-u9hyigbu8DDLs7MnEaaOm9EYpFPC-asROg2Ttm7xdM1oljeQxXFy591IAWwhEhas88pTgL-uvkeno0mMCR-YD0xo3y6E74tmsX5U=&c=QRbr2ptqeYg680_QEACNuZGRQoZ7602WRhdEJLVMiBOtXXKUY7ATVw==&ch=4k3O9LE4j9aHf8j_UOltkqeLDU03des7qnu8HEOUHZWWG-KhG-J52Q==)
---
| Patriot,
For the most part, Florida is a safe haven for strong conservative values and leadership. After all, President Trump recently took up residency in the sunshine state. Because of this, it's drawn the attention of the Socialist Democrats, and they have their eyes on Florida.
---
| | | [STOP THE BLUE WAVE FROM HITTING FLORIDA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tPP3nFJ1Ew4HhtIg8aW3ULHgac8RxfAcU_WIfgf_QRgx1dcfv2HxSYv1Slg6xveSrLPE1Z-u9hyigbu8DDLs7MnEaaOm9EYpFPC-asROg2Ttm7xdM1oljeQxXFy591IAWwhEhas88pTgL-uvkeno0mMCR-YD0xo3y6E74tmsX5U=&c=QRbr2ptqeYg680_QEACNuZGRQoZ7602WRhdEJLVMiBOtXXKUY7ATVw==&ch=4k3O9LE4j9aHf8j_UOltkqeLDU03des7qnu8HEOUHZWWG-KhG-J52Q==)
---
| From President Trump, Governor DeSantis, to me, it sickens the Democrats to know that Florida is a Republican stronghold. We see movement on behalf of the Socialist Democrats in Florida (money and resources are sure to follow).
I will chase them out of Florida myself if I have to, but I need to know you have my back. Will you stand with me and fight to keep the Socialist Democrats out of Florida?

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fb/18e32a7f/515b8c2c/7b227044/2839744083/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fb/18e32a7f/515b8c2c/7b227045/2839744083/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6fb/18e32a7f/515b8c2c/7b22707a/2839744083/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This has been a big week for our campaign. First, Senator Elizabeth Warren endorsed us. Then, the next day, it was New York Communities for Change. Today, we’re proud to announce our campaign has been endorsed by the Progressive Change Campaign Committee! | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2yv/zYF69dGtS2OT4dqqub8TwQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PxMeiPCgRNhXUv8gQ7zwIy5WX-2FNqgwURwlNVAd6G7XmJD30MJzz-2F4PkGi1p6NGM7JlBPamU739TbAoXoRcbCjcC1Z7I7TG2gm7X1M6H9-2FqzZtH-2FjL5RAU7S9qCQYVUy40w-3D/nklo)
Friend, **** **** **** This has been a big week for our campaign. First, Senator Elizabeth Warren endorsed us. Then, the next day, it was New York Communities for Change. **_[Today, we’re proud to announce our campaign has been endorsed by the Progressive Change Campaign Committee!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2yv/zYF69dGtS2OT4dqqub8TwQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIAKzbJK1DvqxeK-2BADPGoEkZOqya6f2BQiX9L8r6g6tkD8JjhLrgm2PLxHSQY895G1Eg7ngYl0BlRRuB7R89-2BEGKEltE3XlxVNGBx99ItYWtOadoR11rPBXOA6cdlDwW-2ByPCteTT9MG2j0nf-2F4yXEKNDuOB8EjhUFCBvmfAQPW0q4O5835JDCrrl2LRnYF3iB64Ql1STRFGlUf0J-2Fq0KBwb/SJm4)_**

body:

| [Team, there's nothing left to say, except:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab3c/134673f2/379cbc4e/699729c0/875157073/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

* There are only HOURS left until our public reporting deadline
* There's just DAYS left before primary voting begins
* Over HALF of voters are still undecided - _anything could happen on election night and we must show up strong!_
* [This is the most important election of our lifetime, team, and we cannot afford to nominate a candidate who will lose to Trump.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab3c/134673f2/379cbc4e/699729c0/875157073/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[This campaign is reaching out to every undecided voter, but we need to raise another $45,000 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to be successful.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab3c/134673f2/379cbc4e/699729c0/875157073/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_013120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
Team,

I know we've sent you a lot of emails in the past few days, but that's because we've got less than 3 weeks until voting starts for the March 3rd primary, and we've got a lot of work to do before then.

And that begins with hitting our January online fundraising goal.

We've only got another $401 to raise before midnight, so, would you consider chipping in any amount to help us get over the finish line? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sri_politico?refcode=20200131PM_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1

Thank you so much for your continued support,

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**My opponent is calling for Republican dark money groups to muddy up the race by spending millions of dollars to confuse voters about her record.**

They're scared of our grassroots campaign to **restore a focus on science, data, and facts back to Congress.**

If we want to make real, meaningful change for the people in this country -- whether that be addressing the climate crisis, combating voter suppression, or ending the gun violence epidemic -- we **have** to flip the Senate in 2020.

[**And with our race polling in a dead heat, we have a fighting chance in Arizona with your help. I want to know what issues most affect you.
Good afternoon Peter,

I’m trying my best to get to every door possible in District 18, but there simply aren’t enough hours in the day! Please take one minute to complete this quick survey on what matters most to you. As your future representative, my goal is to represent you, the people of Houston and your needs. Your opinion is important!

#WeCanDoBetter #FloresForUs

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Peter, Mitch McConnell is already scheming his next moves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Mitch McConnell, as Senate Majority Leader, has been orchestrating the entire impeachment trial to protect the GOP. Rules of the Senate trial? Was Mitch's decision. Vote to call witnesses? Will be Mitch's decision. Exonerate Trump and dismiss charges? Will be Mitch's decision. No matter how this trial ends, Mitch McConnell is thinking 5 steps ahead to keep himself in control of the Senate and Trump in the White House, regardless of what the American people want. We're asking engaged Democrats what they think of Mitch McConnell as we close out January so we can get ready to beat him in November: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde48/6e9863e8/844e436/1db0654f/1395099278/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/oX_Oax6i") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde48/6e9863e8/844e436/1db0654f/1395099278/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/oX_Oax6i") Thank you for your response, WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcde48/6e9863e8/844e436/1db0654f/1395099278/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/oX_Oax6i")

name: Barack Obama
subject: re: My announcement (The Democratic Unity Fund)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
Before the first votes are cast in this primary, join me in supporting the Democratic Unity Fund. | |
---
The night of the 2008 Iowa caucuses changed everything for my campaign. To me, it was a more powerful night than the night I was elected president -- and it set my campaign in motion in a way my team and I never could have imagined. From that night onward, we were in a full sprint through the primaries, laser-focused on earning the nomination. I announced the Democratic Unity Fund alongside the DNC because I know firsthand the immense amount of work and funding it takes to win the general after a competitive primary. **No matter which of our Democratic presidential primary candidates ultimately comes out on top, they'll need a well-prepared national party at their back to compete with what we're up against.** From organizing early in the most competitive battlegrounds to overhauling our party's voter data, the DNC has been working to invest in the tools and resources our eventual nominee for president and Democrats everywhere will use to fight and win in just a few months. _Leaving that work until after the general election begins is too great a risk for our democracy._ **Before the first votes are cast in this primary, will you contribute $7 to the Democratic Unity Fund? Any amount you choose to give today is an investment in the success of our eventual nominee for president and Democrats down the ballot in every corner of our country.** **[ DONATE: $7 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.2yv/CG2BKRBzTE-HlX_RQdihJQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQ9swT3a1vF1Cn-2FJjaviFkcAHiZ3kyNeleuIPCQGRric520me0ztrlV-2B8dbDTBiiO-2FJSNCZ-2FH9LpSWDQISuqchU1Hzs-2Fk124VxlWIjrVW2eZIcfV9UDfPIy9rmpNS-2Fn6DVp7eVneT7CDt-2BzPt1S42KE5jjdyax-2B7E9Wefg1YttE4xDRTpgwfuNnC1DzNWzOI7epBZ9-2BRyQQvT-2FppJrvFCXxyV0m5M5y2hiEzGkIPRz13plZq-2F2dIjRO-2FyKHOYkEMEZyMydX6nYsYrDzywLc3b5pSUFdKHiLh344NnD8iXvJ9w0sviIo3cUbBfhxtKws-2FDntWRmSCXw-2Fq5qxAcr2DTKwWi8kAILa-2FG-2F3FvVDvS88Q-3D-3D/MCgV)

[ Donate another amount ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.2yv/CG2BKRBzTE-HlX_RQdihJQ/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQ9swT3a1vF1Cn-2FJjaviFkcAHiZ3kyNeleuIPCQGRric520me0ztrlV-2B8dbDTBiiOAdX23V0cZsafmfeY2RIYNKiCltbyl0VFeFhmAe9zJfh3QwEfiam8lQ9lzro5jPkyZJohMbvjyW-2F5dietFD-2BrmoZCl7FSGVC-2FMK-2B6EFvEVEEgMcRuLysqcni7NzuWjofsfYsBGD71smN-2B68uI32TKHh0xg2KdgqRnjQIF-2F9apK1-2BNvSFD4TpF6WR4unJCQgY4MYvuM6im8zWXY0JPMLce-2B45NPWrTutmXomlF7f5edy9afgGNX4NXshGxRTSkozg0tRNbF0m1fd6O0zndy8Lzd/lp5g)
** ** ** Whoever voters choose as our nominee for president -- plus our entire slate of Democratic candidates -- will count on a well-resourced, well-organized Democratic Party -- and without one, we’ll all be facing an uphill battle. Winning this November won’t happen on its own. The success of our party this year depends on you. There is more at stake in this election than any other in our lifetime, Derek, and with the first caucuses and primaries just days away, there has never been a more important moment to commit to party unity. **[Donate $7 to the Democratic Unity Fund if you're with me in this fight. There has never been a more crucial time to come together and use our collective power to elect Democrats far and wide.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IwE/ni0YAA/t.2yv/CG2BKRBzTE-HlX_RQdihJQ/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKQ9swT3a1vF1Cn-2FJjaviFkcAHiZ3kyNeleuIPCQGRric520me0ztrlV-2B8dbDTBiiOAdX23V0cZsafmfeY2RIYNiy5QwHoGTlqin5V7O62OcUypwVoLkAFP-2BnNMDrDveB9SDfkIcEleAlQaO5eR-2Fd5XDurEbDHzQ-2BTXH4fM0WXnPLYaB8GVrPbAHnspc3Udp78sNjl6JsXGOQ7AqMvA2dQ0M9-2FoBZQlpdR-2B4KFdQVSPLVbfoudC6HwAmdz5vHs8-2Fyn7-2F6bimWzTrnbhR7r6c2Wjw91KloEJo0qtgKuCIWpnw2HNWR0whXlR91rCOUOImrpOdT2pTovaPbj4OzZ2d3dK/UIoV)** Thank you for believing in our fight. clean_body: Before the first votes are cast in this primary, join me in supporting the Democratic Unity Fund. | | The night of the 2008 Iowa caucuses changed everything for my campaign. To me, it was a more powerful night than the night I was elected president -- and it set my campaign in motion in a way my team and I never could have imagined. From that night onward, we were in a full sprint through the primaries, laser-focused on earning the nomination. I announced the Democratic Unity Fund alongside the DNC because I know firsthand the immense amount of work and funding it takes to win the general after a competitive primary. No matter which of our Democratic presidential primary candidates ultimately comes out on top, they'll need a well-prepared national party at their back to compete with what we're up against. From organizing early in the most competitive battlegrounds to overhauling our party's voter data, the DNC has been working to invest in the tools and resources our eventual nominee for president and Democrats everywhere will use to fight and win in just a few months. Leaving that work until after the general election begins is too great a risk for our democracy. Before the first votes are cast in this primary, will you contribute $7 to the Democratic Unity Fund? Any amount you choose to give today is an investment in the success of our eventual nominee for president and Democrats down the ballot in every corner of our country. Whoever voters choose as our nominee for president -- plus our entire slate of Democratic candidates -- will count on a well-resourced, well-organized Democratic Party -- and without one, we’ll all be facing an uphill battle. Winning this November won’t happen on its own. The success of our party this year depends on you. There is more at stake in this election than any other in our lifetime, Derek, and with the first caucuses and primaries just days away, there has never been a more important moment to commit to party unity. Thank you for believing in our fight. Barack Obama

That being said, it looks like we may fall short of our very first monthly fundraising target of 2020. So, I promised Tina I would reach out to our best online supporters (like you!) to help us catch up before the clock runs out.

**Will you pitch in today to help our campaign reach this first monthly goal of the year before midnight? Anything you can give will make a meaningful difference in our work to keep Minnesota blue.**

Pitch in today, if you can. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Tina doesn't rely on special interest groups or GOP mega-donors who call the shots in Washington. Instead, she's running a campaign powered by supporters like you pitching in whatever you can afford to keep us going strong. It may not be the easy way to do things, but it's the right way. That being said, it looks like we may fall short of our very first monthly fundraising target of 2020. So, I promised Tina I would reach out to our best online supporters (like you!) to help us catch up before the clock runs out. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: It's not just luck
body:
Here in Indiana, we're pretty lucky. We've got a great team of Republican leaders who have put Indiana on the right track -- from President Trump...

View this email in your browser (https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3a79ef6b7)

It's Not Just Luck

Here in Indiana, we're pretty lucky. We've got a great team of Republican leaders who have put Indiana on the right track -- from President Trump to Governor Holcomb to our local county leaders.

But those of us involved daily with elections know that it's not just luck. Indiana Republicans' winning track record at the ballot box is directly correlated to the results we're delivering Hoosiers...and the hard work each and every one of you puts into campaigns and our party across the state.

And that's where this weekend comes in. We have hundreds of Hoosier Republicans descending on downtown Indianapolis this weekend for Congress of Counties (http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , our two-day training and networking event. In breakout sessions, we'll go through the skills it takes to run a winning campaign -- how to raise money (and report it legally), how to share your message with voters, how to use campaign technology, and so much more.

I hope I'll see you there, but if you can't join us...join us on social media with the hashtag #CongressofCounties (https://twitter.com/search?q=%23CongressofCounties&src=typed_query&mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Here's to more victories this November, and the hard work it takes to earn it.

-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Chairman Kyle Hupfer & The Indiana GOP Team welcome hundreds of Hoosier Republicans to a weekend of training at Congress of Counties.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Governor Holcomb Remembers on Eva Education Day

This Monday, Hoosiers students across Indiana celebrated a Hoosier hero and Holocaust survivor, Eva Kor. Governor Holcomb declared Monday -- which coincided with the 75th anniversary of the liberation of Auschwitz -- as Eva Education Day in Indiana. Eva Kor dedicated her life to Holocaust education and the power of forgiveness, including establishing the CANDLES Holocaust Museum in Terre Haute.

As part of Eva Education Day, every middle school and high school principal across the state received the Eva Educational Toolkit. The toolkit includes books, lesson plans and a copy of the documentary "Eva: A-7063" which focuses on Eva’s story and message of forgiveness.

To learn more about Eva Kor's remarkable story and message, watch the documentary about her life (https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07YTGDJH4?pf_rd_p=183f5289-9dc0-416f-942e-e8f213ef368b&pf_rd_r=1Q&mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , or visit the CANDLES Holocaust Museum and Education Center (https://candlesholocaustmuseum.org/25th-candles-home.html?mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) she helped found in Terre Haute.
Governor Holcomb Meets with Sheriffs Across the State

Governor Holcomb met with sheriffs from across the state! These sheriffs were in Indiana's capital this week for their Indiana Sheriffs’ Association Winter Conference. Governor Holcomb has always stood by and supported our law enforcement and appreciates the sacrifices they make every day to keep our communities safe! They play a crucial role in Putting People First!
http://indiana.gop/stateconvention?mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

File Now: Last Chance to Be a Delegate at the
2020 Indiana Republican Party Convention

Next week is the last chance to file to put your name on the May 2020 Republican primary ballot. File before February 7 at 12 p.m. to run to be a delegate at the Indiana Republican Party Convention or to be a precinct committeeman in our party.

If you're interested in running to be a delegate at this year's state convention, which runs June 19-20 in Indianapolis, check out our new state convention website! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bc50c25b37&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=c3a79ef6b7&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

President Trump Signs USMCA

This is a huge win for Hoosier farmers and manufacturers! On Wednesday, President Trump officially signed the USMCA, a modern 21st century trade agreement that will promote free and fair trade between our North American neighbors. President Trump has delivered on another huge promise and will keep delivering wins for Hoosiers!

subject: One last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Congress
body:

| | In 2018, Steve Chabot narrowly escaped with his seat. **In 2018, Steve Chabot narrowly escaped with his seat.** People were fed up by his callous attempts to cut their health care coverage, by his refusal to protect Medicare and Social Security, and by his refusal to stand up for what is right. **We have a huge opportunity** \-- people will be showing up in droves to reject Trump's corruption, hatred, and xenophobia. We need to make sure they know Steve Chabot is nothing but a rubber stamp for Trump's agenda. I'm the right candidate to stand up to Trump and stand up to Chabot. **But our election is only 46 days away** \-- we're running out of time to make our case to voters. If we don't hit our end of month goal, we won't have the resources to win an effective voter outreach program, **a huge win for Chabot.** [**We 're $1,065 short of our goal -- will you chip in to make sure we can win this?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_janeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM7_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+Wersquore+1065+short+of+our+goal++will+y&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM7_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200131_EOM7_U2_X1") Thank you, Nikki

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Setting the stage for the months ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

We know from experience that grassroots organizing, door-to-door block
walking, and direct voter engagement is the best way to bring people into
the process.

That’s how Beto won long shot races in the past. That’s how he won more
votes than any Democrat in Texas history in 2018. That’s how we just broke
the state record for voter turnout in a special election runoff. And
that’s how we’re going to flip Texas in 2020.

We also know that grassroots organizing at such a scale requires a lot of
resources. It’s not easy work — but it’s necessary. And we’re up against
our first fundraising deadline of the year tonight at midnight. So, we’re
asking you:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42236?refcode=ema20200131-78427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=78427%2E444211%2EOFl-Lw ]Can you make a donation before our deadline tonight and help us elect
candidates in Texas and across the country? What we raise at the start of
2020 will determine the strength of our organizing program in the months
to come.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42236?refcode=ema20200131-78427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=78427%2E444211%2EOFl-Lw ]Contribute

For those who just recently started to get involved — or who haven’t heard
from us yet — Powered by People’s mission is to organize grassroots
volunteers to do the tough, necessary work that wins elections.

We’ll register voters (especially those who are just turning 18), knock on
doors, make phone calls, and build the grassroots power necessary to make
progress on the issues we all care most about.

If we are successful, we will not only win the important races in 2020, we
will also develop the infrastructure to ensure that we have sustainable
majorities in Texas and nationwide into the foreseeable future.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42236?refcode=ema20200131-78427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=78427%2E444211%2EOFl-Lw ]If you’re able to, please support Powered By People today by making a
$3 donation. As the name suggests, our work is funded and fueled by YOU.
We know we can’t do it alone.

This is a big undertaking — no question about it. But we’ve seen
first-hand the incredible things we’re capable of when we work together.

Let’s do this,

- Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42236?refcode=ema20200131-78427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=78427%2E444211%2EOFl-Lw ]Donate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=78427%2E444211%2EOFl-Lw

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Sick of impeachment? Time to fight back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COTTON FOR SENATE
body:
Senator Ernst is a fellow veteran, a strong conservative, and she's under attack. PLEASE - as a favor to me, make any contribution right now to help Joni Ernst win.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here](http://links.mail1.nrsc.org/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=41677681&r=MTAwMzAwNDg0MTI1MgS2&b=0&j=MTcwMDAwNjY0MAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Friend,
Are you sick of impeachment and ready to fight back? Tired of hearing Jerry Nadler and Adam Schiff drone on and lie to the American people?

I am. It's time to end this **now**.

We need to focus on what matters like stopping the coronavirus pandemic and securing the border--not impeaching President Trump for the crime of beating Hillary Clinton.

Friend, you probably agree with me. But are you ready to go on **offense**?

subject: quick note (and a puppy pic)

body:

| | Hey Peter -- I wanted to send one last email before I head home to see Brandon, the kids, Baxter, and Snuggles (picture below to brighten your evening!). There are only a few hours left before our end-of-month deadline and my team tells me we're still 243 new donors away from reaching our goal. **[Will you pitch in to help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890465/7f51f7bc/4d6a00b5/4ef052ef/906534152/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.3nd__847__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

This is our last end-of-month deadline before voting starts in the primary so it's crucial we knock this goal out of the park. Plus, with Sen. Cornyn's special interest allies pouring money into ad campaigns all over Texas, we urgently need your help to fight back.

Can I count on you to pitch in before midnight? Here's a special link to make sure your donation counts toward our goal: **[https://mjfortexas.com/JanuaryDeadline](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890465/7f51f7bc/4d6a00b5/4ef052ef/906534152/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-janmatchnd?refcode=email_20200131.3nd__847__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks x 1,000,000,000!

\-- MJ

name: Ryan Winkler
subject: What it's all about
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
Dear Friend,

We hear a lot about politics in the news these days, but the fact of the matter is that we do this job because of Minnesotans like you. As DFLers, we're here to make our great state work better for everyone by ensuring we all have access to affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and an economy that works for all of us.

It can't be overstated: winning a DFL majority was absolutely critical to accomplishing our legislative priorities. Time and time again, we've seen Republicans refuse to reach across the aisle and work together to come up with solutions to our most pressing issues. **So we took it into our own hands and _took back_ the House!**

Here's where you come in: [I need you to give $5 or more to help us continue to promote the work we're doing on behalf of Minnesotans. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/iRH1UYAd8Af95HsPFiwaq0bQF5iN4eVOvkG3R4iwRNs=/B7CC0wbo6TssZYNkqgrLpqJzBiecHHwqiAGZ57DEN0E=)

Thank you, Friend.

Sincerely,

Ryan Winkler
Majority Leader
Minnesota House DFL

[**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iRH1UYAd8Af95HsPFiwaq0bQF5iN4eVOvkG3R4iwRNs=/B7CC0wbo6TssZYNkqgrLpqJzBiecHHwqiAGZ57DEN0E=)

Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

body:

name: Sara 2020
subject: First, Collins voted to confirm Kavanaugh. Then, she waited until she had permission from Mitch McConnell before announcing her decision on witness testimony.
body:
Fight back. Elect Sara Gideon.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3c4/3182691721/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**First:** Susan Collins voted along party lines and cast critical votes to confirm Brett Kavanaugh and pass the GOP tax bill.
**Then:** She waited until she had Mitch McConnell's permission before announcing she would vote for witness testimony in the impeachment trial. It was all just political theater -- she waited until McConnell had secured the votes he needed to block witnesses!
**Now:** We know for sure Mitch McConnell can count on Susan Collins to do his bidding in the Senate -- and she'll only vote against her party when it won't make a difference to the outcome.
**[That's why we're asking you to make a $3 contribution to help defeat Susan Collins right now. Will you chip in at this link?](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3db/3182691721/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200131-2-full")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3db/3182691721/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200131-2-full")**********
**Next:** If you chip in now, we are going to defeat Susan Collins, take back the Senate for Democrats, and kick Mitch McConnell OUT as Majority Leader.
Let's do this,
\- Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3db/3182691721/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200131-2-full")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3da/3182691721/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3d9/3182691721/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802903/4bef7a87/6d6c3bc6/287fb3d8/3182691721/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Thanks for your help in taking back the Senate!
Team Wilmot

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands.

name: Team Hunt
subject: Meet Wesley Hunt in your neighborhood!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

The primary election is approaching soon! We're just 18 days away from the start of early voting. That means that there's never been a better time to stop by a Meet & Greet and hear Wesley's plan for taking back the 7th District!

Join us at one of the below events to meet Wesley and ask him any questions about his background, policy views or whatever else comes to your mind!

**1:00pm on Saturday, February 1st at Willie's Grill and Icehouse**

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=00835f8e9d6d4ca0a498f0484a04a9a4&_e=RuRUHJ4ekmN-fbcY-CpoZ3vEPvcOMuBQwcf1QJCyAzOHK7IXeCGW6s42FO1ZJoA8iOZ4WvWJbZI0FSzwpJ-Vb1Vzvtah9yvLV1xZLKAeS_boYOT5aTDAzAlQazFr76Qg0TfDNxpTRWQmv60d77hEkPPB77caWAMcEtrs_9v3LZiJGJkS4TcPkAz6WJRexl7gHiudofNR0zclAFQulEDV8u8aueAaa-xZ-ZguHDys5NG-F8o6SarYSkuZvhIcbHcIN-p-h0uuHSME1phgDMJr-eKM8xUW2V_-jPXQxo87T90%3D)

clean_body: Friend, The primary election is approaching soon! We're just 18 days away from the start of early voting. That means that there's never been a better time to stop by a Meet & Greet and hear Wesley's plan for taking back the 7th District! Join us at one of the below events to meet Wesley and ask him any questions about his background, policy views or whatever else comes to your mind! 1:00pm on Saturday, February 1st at Willie's Grill and Icehouse 5:30pm on Thursday, February 6th at Buffalo Grille on Bissonnet 5:30pm on Thursday, February 13th at Nottingham Forest Club 1:00pm on Saturday, February 15th at Rudy's Country Store and Bar-B-Q 6:00pm on Monday, February 17th at Kirby Ice House Hope we see you there! Sincerely, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Warren 2020
subject: It's Julián. I'm reaching out to ask if you can chip in to Elizabeth's campaign before tonight's midnight deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth has the passion, she has the plans, and she has the ability to beat Donald Trump in November. She's fighting for the kind of country that we need -- one where no matter who you are, you have | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a392/45c30650/1e40d18c2/66e37890/409833150/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

I was proud to endorse my friend Elizabeth Warren after I suspended my campaign for president.

That's because Elizabeth has the passion, she has the plans, and she has the ability to beat Donald Trump in November. She's fighting for the kind of country that we need -- one where no matter who you are, you have a shot at opportunity.

**But here's the problem:** There is an important FEC fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and Elizabeth needs each one of us now more than ever before in order to reach her grassroots goal of $3.5 million before the end of the night and fully fund the campaign's plans in the lead-up to Iowa and other states just around the corner.

**So with the deadline quickly approaching, I'm asking:

[Can you chip in now to power this campaign in the final days before the Iowa caucuses?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a392/45c30650/1e40d18c2/66e37893/409833150/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zUkZfRU9NX0dPTF9XXzIwMjAwMTMxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3RF_EOM_GOL_W_20200131_V1S3_P")**

>
My grandmother came here as an orphan from Mexico when she was seven-years-old. She worked her entire life as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter to provide for her family -- and just two generations later, one of her grandsons is a Congressman, and I was a cabinet secretary and a candidate for president of the United States. That's the promise of America.

Elizabeth and I were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and because our country gave us a shot to succeed.

**We've both lived our American Dream. And I believe that every kid in America who has their own dream will have a better chance of achieving it with Elizabeth Warren sitting in the Oval Office in 2021.

[If you're with me and Elizabeth in this fight for a better future, please consider chipping in $2, or whatever you can, towards our $3.5 million goal before the FEC deadline at midnight tonight -- every contribution really makes a difference at this critical time.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a392/45c30650/1e40d18c2/66e37893/409833150/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4zUkZfRU9NX0dPTF9XXzIwMjAwMTMxX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN3RF_EOM_GOL_W_20200131_V1S3_P")**

For the Future,

Julian

clean_body: Elizabeth has the passion, she has the plans, and she has the ability to beat Donald Trump in November. She's fighting for the kind of country that we need -- one where no matter who you are, you have | | | "" I was proud to endorse my friend Elizabeth Warren after I suspended my campaign for president. That's because Elizabeth has the passion, she has the plans, and she has the ability to beat Donald Trump in November. She's fighting for the kind of country that we need -- one where no matter who you are, you have a shot at opportunity. But here's the problem: There is an important FEC fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and Elizabeth needs each one of us now more than ever before in order to reach her grassroots goal of $3.5 million before the end of the night and fully fund the campaign's plans in the lead-up to Iowa and other states just around the corner. So with the deadline quickly approaching, I'm asking: "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" My grandmother came here as an orphan from Mexico when she was seven-years-old. She worked her entire life as a maid, a cook, and a babysitter to provide for her family -- and just two generations later, one of her grandsons is a Congressman, and I was a cabinet secretary and a candidate for president of the United States. That's the promise of America. Elizabeth and I were blessed with the kind of opportunity we've had because we worked hard, our families worked hard, and because our country gave us a shot to succeed. We've both lived our American Dream. And I believe that every kid in America who has their own dream will have a better chance of achieving it with Elizabeth Warren sitting in the Oval Office in 2021. "" For the Future, Julian "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Wendy
subject: First match of 2020 about to expire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Our most important deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight.
I won't mince words, friend: Our rare match opportunity expires at midnight tonight, and we're still $1,700 short of our January fundraising goal.
I'm running for Congress to build a stronger future for my two granddaughters and to fight for the grandchildren of others as though they were my own. The stakes are personal. Whoever controls the House will decide the fate of families like yours and mine - and I know you agree with me that we can't have extremist Republicans deciding our children and grandchildren's future.
That's why we can't waste this chance to double every dollar. **Will you give $3 or more right now, before this match expires, to flip Texas blue and expand our House majority?**
Here's the best link to get your gift doubled: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk66-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3a/704929dc/16239565/39938505/574802145/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3a/704929dc/16239565/39938504/574802145/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a3a/704929dc/16239565/39938507/574802145/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Wendy Davis for Congress
3112 Windsor Rd. Ste A #525
Austin, TX 78703

Friends, impeachment is now in the hands of the Senate, and Mitch McConnell has said that he has no intention of holding this president accountable fo | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9963b1e324e34d679813e3b8ec97e32e&_e=8IzfFufDwLB2Wp_rV--g0Dfkv0FwcshxxrKAkSkcvvO-CgqIVvznkpD7GY2L5l7Mtm48ozDThHuBjn7VCRJdhTx49_s404Fk1z1Lyiz-iFGaHlMq-ZBWPWEWi9LiICidlEoequF9e5pgxPtpzBJFDXSHoF2V588UTf_ZKRT3hxjYhHb7J_ITuMskHjRBY57tjyGgRN_FDPiDp0gydg_9x0eAxqTUFUWvD5jxUwhNJojS5fJDDQ9nsLeynicTtv90dcU6f528iFgjash25Tt9JlqXyaUD0bYEsG4JlK-kILZIZY3Q5IDe2V5cDLp-QvARy6CfrIf-VpC7qrmnSZERYQbjH4sgDpdNkqMC-eZSHboCtqDh7x19I0ueLtD7-NBdi2vWPWdibNGb1KSeSrjA5stYEqwUVZAc0MpyK_6zY0eU7Et-vpMmm1tJHVQqvyjS1DLmN7WoSvjGd6GTuhJ8FMTfkDhn05UFrmqFdup5V1c%3D) Friends, impeachment is now in the hands of the Senate, and Mitch McConnell has said that he has no intention of holding this president accountable for his actions. I also wonder about what’s being lost by the GOP’s reluctance to hold Trump accountable. Had President Trump been elected when I was fleeing the Liberian civil war, would I have been able to come to America? Would I have been given a chance to serve my country in the armed forces? Or come to Helena and lead my community there as Mayor? We can’t let this continue. We can’t let him continue to chip away at the hope that America represents. **__This is personal to me.__** **[If you’re with me, please donate any amount to help us replace Steve Daines, Mitch McConnell’s biggest yes-man in the U.S. Senate.
