| Dear Hoosier Republican, It’s almost over. The sham impeachment hoax is finally coming to the inevitable end. House Democrats have spent the last 5 months abusing their power to drag our country through an embarrassing impeachment all with the goal of overturning the 2016 election. If they had any shame, they’d be embarrassed for what they’ve done to our constitution. [**TO MAKE SURE THIS NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN, WE NEED TO SEND MORE REPUBLICAN CANDIDATES TO WASHINGTON DC TO SUPPORT THE PRESIDENT!**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7aab88400c&e=1acd9bb3d6) However, throughout all of this, President Donald Trump has kept racking up the wins for our country. Just think about it, since impeachment hysteria began, President Trump has:
* Negotiated a new phase 1 trade deal with China
* Signed USMCA, replaced NAFTA and got a much better deal for our farmers and manufacturers
* Continued GDP growth due to Trump’s booming economy
* Hosted top Israeli leaders an unveiled a pathway to Middle East peace
* Announced price transparency guidelines for healthcare so we all know how much things cost
* Record low unemployment for African Americans, Hispanics and women
* Record high stock market
* Killed two of the world’s biggest terrorists and threats to the United States: al-Baghdadi and Soleimani

He’s done this while strengthening our southern border, leading the biggest economic boom since Reagan, rebuilding our military, and overseeing record low unemployment for Hispanics, African Americans and women. Compare that to what Pelosi, Schiff, Nadler, the Squad, Cryin’ Chuck and the rest of the socialists have done:
* Partisan impeachment of the president
* Handed out pens

Which record would you rather have? [**PRESIDENT TRUMP NEEDS MORE REPUBLICANS IN WASHINGTON. DONATE HERE AND HELP US FLIP THE HOUSE BACK TO GOP CONTROL**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6b4ac226c5&e=1acd9bb3d6) In fact, on Tuesday, after the president is rightfully acquitted and vindicated by the senate, Trump will talk directly to the American People and demonstrate, quite emphatically, how strong the state of our union is. Let’s hope his next State of the Union, given in 2021 after he’s sworn in for a second term, has two Republicans sitting behind him: Vice President Mike Pence and a new Republican Speaker of the House. Impeachment was a colossal waste of time. A witch hunt designed to remove our president. An abuse of power aimed at interfering with the next election. Thankfully, it’s almost over. And President Trump is just getting started! [**CONTRIBUTE HERE TO SEND A MESSAGE TO PELOSI, SCHIFF, THE SQUAD, AND THE SOCIALIST DEMOCRATS. LET’S TAKE BACK THE HOUSE IN 2020!**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db753f9e0e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

subject: Biggest update of our campaign yet.
body:
We are experiencing amazing momentum | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e5cdcb49d85b/im-running-for-texas-house-12139533?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=613804fb09&e=4f010155df)
---
| Peter,

The past couple of days have been a whirlwind for our campaign. One after another we received two incredibly important endorsements of our campaign to take back HD 113.

Governor Greg Abbott, who has been on the front lines of keeping Texas the #1 state to raise a family and start a business and Associated Republicans of Texas, the biggest group fighting to keep Texas red have both endorsed our campaign.

These endorsements are incredibly important votes of confidence in our campaign.

We are working incredibly hard to earn every vote we can so we can give HD 113 the commonsense conservative representation it deserves.

The citizens of this district are hardworking everyday Texans who just want to experience the American Dream and Texas Miracle for their families. Rhetta Bowers' far-left ideology is bad for their pocketbook and against their values--that's why we are going to win.

You can send our momentum sky-high by helping us post a strong fundraising total at our month-end deadline at MIDNIGHT tonight.**[Please consider donating just $5](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=537a919f99&e=4f010155df)** to help power our campaign and don't forget to follow us on [**Facebook**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d1eaab852c&e=4f010155df), [**Twitter**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=17d86751a2&e=4f010155df), and [**Instagram**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e8de56d1e1&e=4f010155df) to keep up to date with our activities on the trail!

Thank you for helping us fight for Texas and Freedom.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2521972a7c&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas
